raw_text: Job Title: Applied AI Engineer, International Public Sector. Description: <p>Scale’s rapidly growing International Public Sector team is focused on using AI to address critical challenges facing the public sector around the world. Our core work consists of:</p> <ul> <li>Creating custom AI applications that will impact millions of citizens</li> <li>Generating high-quality training data for national LLMs</li> <li>Upskilling and advisory services to spread the impact of AI</li> </ul> <p>We are hiring Applied AI Engineers to build custom end-to-end AI applications for our public sector clients using the latest developments in the field of AI. You will also get the opportunity to develop and be part of creating custom datasets, evaluations, and fine-tuning these sophisticated models to maximize performance and apply on real world use cases with global reach.&nbsp;</p> <p>At Scale, we’re not just building AI solutions—we are building repeatable blocks to enable the public sector to transform their operations and better serve citizens through cutting-edge technology. If you’re ready to shape the future of AI in the public sector and be a member of our rapidly expanding team, we’d love to hear from you.</p> <p><strong>You will:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Partner with public sector clients to deeply understand their challenges and define AI-driven solutions&nbsp;</li> <li>Build and deploy end-to-end AI applications into production leveraging latest developments from the biggest AI labs, and open source models</li> <li>Collaborate with cross-functional teams, including data annotation specialists, to create high-quality training datasets</li> <li>Design and maintain robust evaluation frameworks to ensure the reliability and effectiveness of AI models</li> <li>Participate in customer engagements, including occasional travel (approximately two weeks per quarter)</li> <li>Contribute to the scaling of AI capabilities in the public sector through hands-on knowledge sharing</li> </ul> <p><strong>Ideally you’d have:</strong></p> <ul> <li>A strong engineering background, with a Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Mathematics, or a related quantitative field (or equivalent practical experience)</li> <li>7+ years of post-graduation engineering experience, with demonstrated proficiency in languages such as Python, TypeScript/JavaScript, Java, or C++.</li> <li>2+ years of experience applying AI/ML in production environments, such as deploying deep learning solutions, building generative/agentic AI applications or setting up evaluations pipelines</li> <li>Familiarity with cloud-based machine learning tools and platforms (e.g. AWS, GCP, Azure)</li> <li>Strong problem-solving skills, with a data-driven approach to iterating on machine learning models and datasets</li> <li>Excellent written and verbal communication skills to collaborate effectively in a cross-functional environment</li> </ul> <p><strong>Nice to haves:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Experience working at a startup, particularly as founding engineer</li> <li>Experience building and deploying large-scale AI solutions</li> <li>Strong written and verbal communication skills to operate in a cross-functional team environment</li> <li>Proficiency in Arabic (if focused on language models)</li> </ul><div class="content-conclusion"><p><strong><em>PLEASE NOTE:&nbsp;</em></strong><em>Our policy requires a 90-day waiting period before reconsidering candidates for the same role. This allows us to ensure a fair and thorough evaluation of all applicants.</em></p> <p><strong>About Us:</strong></p> <p><em>At Scale, our mission is to develop reliable AI systems for the world's most important decisions. Our products provide the high-quality data and full-stack technologies that power the world's leading models, and help enterprises and governments build, deploy, and oversee AI applications that deliver real impact. We work closely with industry leaders like Meta, Cisco, DLA Piper, Mayo Clinic, Time Inc., the Government of Qatar, and U.S. government agencies including the Army and Air Force. We are expanding our team to accelerate the development of AI applications.</em></p> <p><em>We believe that everyone should be able to bring their whole selves to work, which is why we are proud to be an inclusive and equal opportunity workplace. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability status, gender identity or Veteran status.&nbsp;</em></p> <p><em>We are committed to working with and providing reasonable accommodations to applicants with physical and mental disabilities. If you need assistance and/or a reasonable accommodation in the application or recruiting process due to a disability, please contact us at accommodations@scale.com. Please see the United States Department of Labor's </em><a href="https://www.eeoc.gov/sites/default/files/2023-06/22-088_EEOC_KnowYourRights6.12ScreenRdr.pdf"><em>Know Your Rights poster</em></a><em> for additional information.</em></p> <p><em>We comply with the United States Department of Labor's </em><a href="https://www.dol.gov/sites/dolgov/files/ofccp/pdf/pay-transp_English_unformattedESQA508c.pdf"><em>Pay Transparency provision</em></a><em>.&nbsp;</em></p> <p><em><strong>PLEASE NOTE: </strong>We collect, retain and use personal data for our professional business purposes, including notifying you of job opportunities that may be of interest and sharing with our affiliates. We limit the personal data we collect to that which we believe is appropriate and necessary to manage applicants’ needs, provide our services, and comply with applicable laws. Any information we collect in connection with your application will be treated in accordance with our internal policies and programs designed to protect personal data. Please see our <a href="https://scale.com/legal/privacy" target="_blank">privacy policy</a> for additional information.</em></p></div>

raw_text: Job Title: Business Operations, IPS. Description: <p>Scale’s International Public Sector (IPS) team is growing quickly as we work to <strong>build reliable AI systems for governments around the world</strong>. This is one of the most ambitious and high-impact problems of our time, and we’re assembling a team of sharp, mission-driven operators to help us do it.</p> <p>We’re looking for a <strong>Business Operations &amp; Strategy Associate</strong> to support critical initiatives across IPS product, engineering, sales, marketing and core operations. This role is ideal for a highly analytical generalist - someone who thrives in ambiguity and is able to move fluidly between strategic problem-solving and rolling up your sleeves to make the business run better day to day. No task is too small if it drives impact.</p> <h3><strong>You will:</strong></h3> <ul> <li>Help drive the team’s core operating cadence and strategic planning moments, including structuring inputs for business reviews, planning cycles, deep dives and offsites to enable clear decisions and effective execution</li> <li>Partner with functional leads to track and pressure-test OKRs and key metrics, helping teams move from goals to measurable outcomes</li> <li>Drive preparation for team All Hands by shaping narratives, distilling complex work into clear updates, and ensuring follow-through on commitments</li> <li>Collaborate with Sales Operations on forecasting and pipeline reviews to improve predictability and drive tighter execution across the go-to-market team</li> <li>Work closely with Product Managers and Product Operations to connect roadmap decisions to delivery capacity, operational constraints, and downstream impact</li> <li>Identify and address cross-functional gaps in how we operate - structuring solutions and pushing them through to execution where ownership or process is unclear</li> </ul> <h3><strong>Ideally you would have:</strong></h3> <ul> <li>A penchant for digging deeply into the data yourself, thinking from first principles, and iterating quickly to deliver results</li> <li>A strong orientation toward outcomes, and a history of being scrappy when it counts</li> <li>Low ego and highly collaborative - you’re excited to work alongside smart, humble teammates and do whatever it takes to help the team succeed</li> <li>An easygoing interpersonal style that you bring to bear in everything from deep technical conversations with engineers to polished executive level comms</li> <li>Proven ability to build high trust relationships with a wide range of people across the organization</li> <li>Experience in product or project management, taking projects from conception to launch</li> <li>Excellent qualitative and quantitative analytical skills</li> </ul> <h3><strong>Nice to haves:</strong></h3> <ul> <li>~3 years at a top-tier consulting firm, or experience in investment banking, private equity, or similar</li> <li>Exposure to tech, product or operational roles in a high-growth environment</li> <li>MBA a bonus (but not required)</li> </ul><div class="content-conclusion"><p><strong><em>PLEASE NOTE:&nbsp;</em></strong><em>Our policy requires a 90-day waiting period before reconsidering candidates for the same role. This allows us to ensure a fair and thorough evaluation of all applicants.</em></p> <p><strong>About Us:</strong></p> <p><em>At Scale, our mission is to develop reliable AI systems for the world's most important decisions. Our products provide the high-quality data and full-stack technologies that power the world's leading models, and help enterprises and governments build, deploy, and oversee AI applications that deliver real impact. We work closely with industry leaders like Meta, Cisco, DLA Piper, Mayo Clinic, Time Inc., the Government of Qatar, and U.S. government agencies including the Army and Air Force. We are expanding our team to accelerate the development of AI applications.</em></p> <p><em>We believe that everyone should be able to bring their whole selves to work, which is why we are proud to be an inclusive and equal opportunity workplace. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability status, gender identity or Veteran status.&nbsp;</em></p> <p><em>We are committed to working with and providing reasonable accommodations to applicants with physical and mental disabilities. If you need assistance and/or a reasonable accommodation in the application or recruiting process due to a disability, please contact us at accommodations@scale.com. Please see the United States Department of Labor's </em><a href="https://www.eeoc.gov/sites/default/files/2023-06/22-088_EEOC_KnowYourRights6.12ScreenRdr.pdf"><em>Know Your Rights poster</em></a><em> for additional information.</em></p> <p><em>We comply with the United States Department of Labor's </em><a href="https://www.dol.gov/sites/dolgov/files/ofccp/pdf/pay-transp_English_unformattedESQA508c.pdf"><em>Pay Transparency provision</em></a><em>.&nbsp;</em></p> <p><em><strong>PLEASE NOTE: </strong>We collect, retain and use personal data for our professional business purposes, including notifying you of job opportunities that may be of interest and sharing with our affiliates. We limit the personal data we collect to that which we believe is appropriate and necessary to manage applicants’ needs, provide our services, and comply with applicable laws. Any information we collect in connection with your application will be treated in accordance with our internal policies and programs designed to protect personal data. Please see our <a href="https://scale.com/legal/privacy" target="_blank">privacy policy</a> for additional information.</em></p></div>

raw_text: Job Title: Business Operations & Strategy Manager . Description: <p>Scale exists to accelerate the development of AI applications. We believe that creating and harnessing the power of AI is both wildly ambitious and the most impactful opportunity we can be working on. To that end, we are looking for a very specific candidate for the Business Operations &amp; Strategy team - a hard charging generalist that is obsessed with impact, deeply analytical, low ego, and ready to embrace the intensity required to achieve our goals. If you are an experienced operator who excels at solving hard problems while building strong teams and relationships, we want to hear from you!</p> <p><strong>The team</strong></p> <p>The Business Operations &amp; Strategy team is a tight-knit group that drives mission-critical initiatives across the breadth of Scale, supporting product, engineering, sales, marketing, and core operations by providing planning, analytical, operational, and strategic support.&nbsp;</p> <p>As Scale continues to rapidly grow, most of the problems we face have ambiguous causes and unknown solutions - <em>we cannot pattern match our way to winning</em>. The BizOps team dives deeply into Scale’s biggest challenges on a project-basis, driving clarity and outcomes by breaking down the problem in a highly structured way. This means that every member of the BizOps team must be highly operational, ready to shift between strategic, cross-functional projects and rolling up our sleeves to run day-to-day operations; no job or task is too small.</p> <h3><strong>You will:</strong></h3> <ul> <li>Take on Scale’s difficult-but-ambiguous problems, breaking them down in a structured way and driving them to successful outcomes</li> <li>Dive deeply into our operations and data - you will become an expert on how Scale operates, and develop a deep understanding of the AI industry</li> <li>Build high trust relationships across the organization to partner with and influence outcomes beyond what you directly touch</li> <li>Have full ownership of your work and outcome - we support each other as a team, but you will have broad latitude to run autonomously as you get up to speed&nbsp;</li> <li>Partner with, influence, and support the Scale executive team as we tackle the most difficult decisions in the business</li> <li>Help incubate, seed, and scale new teams</li> <li>Design, manage, and iterate on the operational and analytical systems and processes that make Scale hum</li> <li>Eventually spin out to take on full ownership of a given role, team, or opportunity in Scale</li> </ul> <h3><strong>Ideally you would have:</strong></h3> <ul> <li>The ability to run on your own, operating at the highest level in a rapidly changing industry during a period of hypergrowth</li> <li>A penchant for digging deeply into the data yourself, thinking from first principles, and iterating quickly to deliver results</li> <li>A strong orientation toward outcomes, and a history of being scrappy when it counts</li> <li>Low ego - you will be joining a team of truly exceptional generalist athletes, there is no room for ego</li> <li>An easygoing interpersonal style that you bring to bear in everything from deep technical conversations with engineers to polished executive level comms</li> <li>Proven ability to build high trust relationships with a wide range of people across the organization</li> <li>A history of developing lightweight processes and getting them adopted</li> <li>Experience in product or project management, taking projects from conception to launch</li> <li>Excellent qualitative and quantitative analytical skills</li> </ul> <h3><strong>Nice to haves:</strong></h3> <ul> <li>4+ years of experience in a highly strategic, analytical and operational role within a rapidly growing company</li> <li>2+ years consulting (McKinsey, Bain, or BCG preferred), investment banking, private equity, or hedge fund experience</li> <li>Top MBA</li> <li>Experience with SQL or a willingness/aptitude to learn</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p><em>Compensation packages at Scale for eligible roles include base salary, equity, and benefits. The range displayed on each job posting reflects the minimum and maximum target for new hire salaries for the position, determined by work location and additional factors, including job-related skills, experience, interview performance, and relevant education or training. Scale employees in eligible roles are also granted equity based compensation, subject to Board of Director approval. Your recruiter can share more about the specific salary range for your preferred location during the hiring process, and confirm whether the hired role will be eligible for equity grant. You’ll also receive benefits including, but not limited to: Comprehensive health, dental and vision coverage, retirement benefits, a learning and development stipend, and generous PTO. Additionally, this role may be eligible for additional benefits such as a commuter stipend.</em></p></div><div class="title">The base salary range for this full-time position in the location of San Francisco is:</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$176,000</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$220,000 USD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><p><strong><em>PLEASE NOTE:&nbsp;</em></strong><em>Our policy requires a 90-day waiting period before reconsidering candidates for the same role. This allows us to ensure a fair and thorough evaluation of all applicants.</em></p> <p><strong>About Us:</strong></p> <p><em>At Scale, our mission is to develop reliable AI systems for the world's most important decisions. Our products provide the high-quality data and full-stack technologies that power the world's leading models, and help enterprises and governments build, deploy, and oversee AI applications that deliver real impact. We work closely with industry leaders like Meta, Cisco, DLA Piper, Mayo Clinic, Time Inc., the Government of Qatar, and U.S. government agencies including the Army and Air Force. We are expanding our team to accelerate the development of AI applications.</em></p> <p><em>We believe that everyone should be able to bring their whole selves to work, which is why we are proud to be an inclusive and equal opportunity workplace. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability status, gender identity or Veteran status.&nbsp;</em></p> <p><em>We are committed to working with and providing reasonable accommodations to applicants with physical and mental disabilities. If you need assistance and/or a reasonable accommodation in the application or recruiting process due to a disability, please contact us at accommodations@scale.com. Please see the United States Department of Labor's </em><a href="https://www.eeoc.gov/sites/default/files/2023-06/22-088_EEOC_KnowYourRights6.12ScreenRdr.pdf"><em>Know Your Rights poster</em></a><em> for additional information.</em></p> <p><em>We comply with the United States Department of Labor's </em><a href="https://www.dol.gov/sites/dolgov/files/ofccp/pdf/pay-transp_English_unformattedESQA508c.pdf"><em>Pay Transparency provision</em></a><em>.&nbsp;</em></p> <p><em><strong>PLEASE NOTE: </strong>We collect, retain and use personal data for our professional business purposes, including notifying you of job opportunities that may be of interest and sharing with our affiliates. We limit the personal data we collect to that which we believe is appropriate and necessary to manage applicants’ needs, provide our services, and comply with applicable laws. Any information we collect in connection with your application will be treated in accordance with our internal policies and programs designed to protect personal data. Please see our <a href="https://scale.com/legal/privacy" target="_blank">privacy policy</a> for additional information.</em></p></div>

raw_text: Job Title: Business Sourcer, Contract. Description: <div class="p-rich_text_section"> <p data-start="266" data-end="281"><strong data-start="266" data-end="281">About Scale</strong></p> <p data-start="283" data-end="711">Scale’s mission is to accelerate the development of AI applications. To build the best models, you need the best data—and Scale delivers exactly that. Our Generative AI Platform uses enterprise data to safely customize powerful foundation models, unlocking AI value across industries. The Scale Data Engine provides end-to-end capabilities for data collection, curation, annotation, model evaluation, safety, and optimization.</p> <p data-start="713" data-end="1117">We power many of the world’s most advanced LLMs and generative systems through world-class RLHF, data generation, evaluation, and alignment. Leading technology companies (Microsoft, Meta), enterprises (Fox, Accenture), AI innovators (OpenAI, Cohere), and U.S. Government agencies (U.S. Army, U.S. Air Force) trust Scale to deliver the mission-critical data and infrastructure behind their AI initiatives.</p> <h3 data-start="1124" data-end="1140"><strong data-start="1128" data-end="1140">The Role</strong></h3> <p data-start="1142" data-end="1472">As Scale continues rapid growth, our Recruiting team is essential to achieving our ambitious technical hiring goals. We’re seeking a skilled <strong>Business Sourcer</strong> to partner closely with our Core Business organizations, hiring world-class talent across finance, legal, G&amp;A, GTM, and various other critical functions.</p> <p data-start="1474" data-end="1688">This is a high-impact role where you will shape hiring strategy, build diverse talent pipelines, and deliver an exceptional candidate experience that reflects Scale’s values of excellence, velocity, and innovation.</p> </div> <h3 class="" data-start="242" data-end="265"><strong data-start="246" data-end="265">What You’ll Do:</strong></h3> <ul data-start="267" data-end="1324"> <li class="" data-start="267" data-end="348"> <p class="" data-start="269" data-end="348"><strong data-start="269" data-end="309">Review and screen inbound applicants</strong> to identify high-potential candidates.</p> </li> <li class="" data-start="349" data-end="492"> <p class="" data-start="351" data-end="492"><strong data-start="351" data-end="396">Drive strategic outbound sourcing efforts</strong> to attract top-tier talent across a variety of roles spanning GTM, G&amp;A, finance, legal, etc.</p> </li> <li class="" data-start="651" data-end="690">Adapt and evolve with our processes</strong> as the company grows, always seeking ways to improve efficiency and impact.</p> </li> <li class="" data-start="767" experience.</p> </li> <li class="" data-start="1157" data-end="1324"> <p class="" data-start="1159" data-end="1324"><strong data-start="1159" data-end="1218">Build strong, trust-based relationships with candidates</strong>, understanding their goals and ensuring an exceptional, personalized journey from first contact to close.</p> </li> </ul> <p class="" data-start="1159" data-end="1324"><strong data-start="1335" data-end="1362">What We’re Looking For:</strong></p> <ul data-start="1364" data-end="1907"> <li class="" data-start="1364" data-end="1453"> <p class="" data-start="1366" data-end="1453">2+ years of sourcing or recruiting experience in a fast-paced, high-growth environment.</p> </li> <li class="" data-start="1454" data-end="1564"> <p class="" data-start="1456" data-end="1564">A proven track record of sourcing top talent.</p> </li> <li class="" data-start="1565" data-end="1682"> <p class="" data-start="1567" data-end="1682">Strong market mapping and talent research skills—you know how to uncover hard-to-find profiles and where they live.</p> </li> <li class="" data-start="1683" data-end="1776"> <p class="" data-start="1685" data-end="1776">A data-driven mindset with the ability to communicate metrics and insights to stakeholders.</p> </li> <li class="" data-start="1777" data-end="1907"> <p class="" data-start="1779" data-end="1907">Passion for delivering an outstanding candidate experience, including being the go-to liaison for candidate updates and support.</p> </li> </ul> <p class="" data-start="1779" data-end="1907"><strong Description: <div class="p-rich_text_section"> <p data-start="266" data-end="281"><strong data-start="266" data-end="281">About Scale</strong></p> <p data-start="283" data-end="711">Scale’s mission is to accelerate the development of AI applications. To build the best models, you need the best data—and Scale delivers exactly that. Our Generative AI Platform uses enterprise data to safely customize powerful foundation models, unlocking AI value across industries. The Scale Data Engine provides end-to-end capabilities for data collection, curation, annotation, model evaluation, safety, and optimization.</p> <p data-start="713" data-end="1117">We power many of the world’s most advanced LLMs and generative systems through world-class RLHF, data generation, evaluation, and alignment. Leading technology companies (Microsoft, Meta), enterprises (Fox, Accenture), AI innovators (OpenAI, Cohere), and U.S. Government agencies (U.S. Army, U.S. Air Force) trust Scale to deliver the mission-critical data and infrastructure behind their AI initiatives.</p> <h3 data-start="1124" data-end="1140"><strong data-start="1128" data-end="1140">The Role</strong></h3> <p data-start="1142" data-end="1472">As Scale continues rapid growth, our Recruiting team is essential to achieving our ambitious technical hiring goals. raw_text: Job Title: Communications Manager, Corporate & Product. Description: <p>Scale delivers solutions for leading AI labs, enterprises, and governments, and helps define the frameworks that guide how AI serves society. Our mission is to develop reliable AI systems for the world’s most important decisions. That work is powered by our data platform and our Safety Evaluations and Alignment Lab (SEAL) research, which advance AI safety, evaluation, and performance across the industry. As Communications Manager, Corporate and Product, you will help shape how Scale shows up across the industry, with a particular focus on telling our data and research story. This role is centered on translating complex technical and research-driven work into clear, compelling narratives. A core focus of the role is pitching and positioning new research around AI safety, evaluation, and model performance, including how leading AI systems score across new and emerging benchmarks. This includes owning the communications strategy for new benchmark and research launches, drawing on Scale’s experience rolling out initiatives like Humanity’s Last Exam, the Remote Labor Index, and SWE-Bench Pro.</p> <p>You will help tell the story of how Scale’s data, evaluations, and research power the world’s most advanced AI models, and how our SEAL team is pushing the field forward through rigorous benchmarking, safety research, and real-world evaluation. In this role, you will partner closely with researchers and product leaders, as well as teams across communications, social, marketing, and go-to-market. You will play a key role in strengthening Scale’s reputation with AI labs, policymakers, and the broader technology ecosystem. This position reports directly to the Head of Corporate &amp; Product Communications.</p> <h3><strong>You Will</strong></h3> <ul> <li>Support corporate and product communications initiatives with a strong emphasis on data and SEAL research, including new AI reports and leaderboard launches, benchmark and evaluation releases, technical blog posts, and thought leadership focused on how models perform.&nbsp;</li> <li>Help translate highly technical research, evaluations, and model performance into narratives that resonate with business, technology, policy and mainstream audiences.</li> <li>Identify opportunities to position Scale as a trusted authority in AI data, evaluation, and research by developing media strategies, storylines, and press materials such as Q&amp;As, briefing documents, blog posts, and research announcements.</li> <li>Partner closely with SEAL researchers, product managers, and engineers to deeply understand their work and accurately represent it externally.</li> <li>Build and maintain relationships with reporters and influencers across AI research, technology, and business media.</li> <li>Collaborate with legal, policy, marketing, and social teams to ensure messaging is accurate, consistent, and aligned across channels.</li> <li>Contribute to the planning and execution of multi-channel communications campaigns that elevate Scale’s research credibility and product leadership.</li> <li>Monitor media coverage, academic discourse, and industry conversations to identify opportunities for Scale to lead, respond, or clarify.</li> <li>Help prepare executives and technical leaders for interviews, conferences, briefings, and speaking opportunities.</li> <li>Track performance against communications goals and refine strategies based on impact and feedback.</li> </ul> <h3><strong>Qualifications</strong></h3> <ul> <li>7–10 years of experience in technology communications, product communications, or research-focused PR (in-house or agency).</li> <li>Strong understanding of AI, data, or developer-facing technology, with the ability to distill complex technical concepts into clear, simple stories.</li> <li>Experience supporting research, platform, or deeply technical products is strongly preferred.</li> <li>Demonstrated success in media relations, including securing coverage for technical or research-driven stories across traditional and emerging formats.</li> <li>Excellent writing and editing skills across formats, including narrative documents, announcement blog posts, and executive briefing materials.</li> <li>Highly organized, with the ability to manage multiple complex projects in a fast-paced environment.</li> <li>Comfortable working closely with researchers, product leaders, and senior executives.</li> <li>Genuine enthusiasm for AI model development and research, and the role these play in advancing the field responsibly.</li> </ul><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p><em>Compensation packages at Scale for eligible roles include base salary, equity, and benefits. The range displayed on each job posting reflects the minimum and maximum target for new hire salaries for the position, determined by work location and additional factors, including job-related skills, experience, interview performance, and relevant education or training. Scale employees in eligible roles are also granted equity based compensation, subject to Board of Director approval. Your recruiter can share more about the specific salary range for your preferred location during the hiring process, and confirm whether the hired role will be eligible for equity grant. You’ll also receive benefits including, but not limited to: Comprehensive health, dental and vision coverage, retirement benefits, a learning and development stipend, and generous PTO. Additionally, this role may be eligible for additional benefits such as a commuter stipend.</em></p></div><div class="title">Please reference the job posting's subtitle for where this position will be located. For pay transparency purposes, the base salary range for this full-time position in the locations of San Francisco and New York is:</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$151,200</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$189,000 USD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><p><strong><em>PLEASE NOTE:&nbsp;</em></strong><em>Our policy requires a 90-day waiting period before reconsidering candidates for the same role. This allows us to ensure a fair and thorough evaluation of all applicants.</em></p> <p><strong>About Us:</strong></p> <p><em>At Scale, our mission is to develop reliable AI systems for the world's most important decisions. Our products provide the high-quality data and full-stack technologies that power the world's leading models, and help enterprises and governments build, deploy, and oversee AI applications that deliver real impact. We work closely with industry leaders like Meta, Cisco, DLA Piper, Mayo Clinic, Time Inc., the Government of Qatar, and U.S. government agencies including the Army and Air Force. We are expanding our team to accelerate the development of AI applications.</em></p> <p><em>We believe that everyone should be able to bring their whole selves to work, which is why we are proud to be an inclusive and equal opportunity workplace. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability status, gender identity or Veteran status.&nbsp;</em></p> <p><em>We are committed to working with and providing reasonable accommodations to applicants with physical and mental disabilities. If you need assistance and/or a reasonable accommodation in the application or recruiting process due to a disability, please contact us at accommodations@scale.com. Please see the United States Department of Labor's </em><a href="https://www.eeoc.gov/sites/default/files/2023-06/22-088_EEOC_KnowYourRights6.12ScreenRdr.pdf"><em>Know Your Rights poster</em></a><em> for additional information.</em></p> <p><em>We comply with the United States Department of Labor's </em><a href="https://www.dol.gov/sites/dolgov/files/ofccp/pdf/pay-transp_English_unformattedESQA508c.pdf"><em>Pay Transparency provision</em></a><em>.&nbsp;</em></p> <p><em><strong>PLEASE NOTE: </strong>We collect, retain and use personal data for our professional business purposes, including notifying you of job opportunities that may be of interest and sharing with our affiliates. We limit the personal data we collect to that which we believe is appropriate and necessary to manage applicants’ needs, provide our services, and comply with applicable laws. Any information we collect in connection with your application will be treated in accordance with our internal policies and programs designed to protect personal data. Please see our <a href="https://scale.com/legal/privacy" target="_blank">privacy policy</a> for additional information.</em></p></div>

raw_text: Job Title: Contractor Staffing Lead (Operations Program Manager). Description: <p>Scale’s Robotics business is rapidly expanding, supporting customers building physical AI. This position will be a key contributor in working to source, train, maintain, and improve the performance of our contractor workforce.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>You will:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Partner with cross-functional stakeholders to understand staffing and performance requirements for our Collector workforce.</li> <li>Support day-to-day operations by ensuring that staffing is properly allocated for business needs.</li> <li>Manage and control timecards to ensure proper payment for time worked.</li> <li>Build training and feedback modules to ensure continuous improvement</li> <li>Become a subject matter expert on all capabilities of the robotics platforms deployed in the factory.<br><br></li> </ul> <p><strong>You have:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Academic (Bachelors degree) or industry experience - data collection, staffing, independent contractor assignments, or human resources.</li> <li>1-3 years of experience managing hourly staffing across multiple locations.</li> <li>Experience managing risk and operational safety.</li> <li>Strong project management and interpersonal skills, high attention to detail, and a strong sense of ownership.</li> <li>High level of comfort communicating effectively across internal and external organizations.</li> </ul> <p><br><strong>Nice to have:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Hands-on experience in Robotics, AI, and/or Computer Vision.</li> <li>Intellectual curiosity, empathy, and ability to operate with a high degree of autonomy.</li> <li>Experience building and/or maintaining lab networks and data pipelines.</li> <li>Experience running large-scale data collection and controlled experiments</li> <li>Experience in logistics.</li> </ul><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p><em>Compensation packages at Scale for eligible roles include base salary, equity, and benefits. The range displayed on each job posting reflects the minimum and maximum target for new hire salaries for the position, determined by work location and additional factors, including job-related skills, experience, interview performance, and relevant education or training. Scale employees in eligible roles are also granted equity based compensation, subject to Board of Director approval. Your recruiter can share more about the specific salary range for your preferred location during the hiring process, and confirm whether the hired role will be eligible for equity grant. cleaned_text: Job Title: Contractor Staffing Lead (Operations Program Manager). Description: <p>Scale’s Robotics business is rapidly expanding, supporting customers building physical AI. This position will be a key contributor in working to source, train, maintain, and improve the performance of our contractor workforce.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>You will:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Partner with cross-functional stakeholders to understand staffing and performance requirements for our Collector workforce.</li> <li>Support day-to-day operations by ensuring that staffing is properly allocated for business needs.</li> <li>Manage and control timecards to ensure proper payment for time worked.</li> <li>Build training and feedback modules to ensure continuous improvement</li> <li>Become a subject matter expert on all capabilities of the robotics platforms deployed in the factory.<br><br></li> </ul> <p><strong>You have:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Academic (Bachelors degree) or industry experience - data collection, staffing, independent contractor assignments, or human resources.</li> <li>1-3 years of experience managing hourly staffing across multiple locations.</li> <li>Experience managing risk and operational safety.</li> <li>Strong project management and interpersonal skills, high attention to detail, and a strong sense of ownership.</li> <li>High level of comfort communicating effectively across internal and external organizations.</li> </ul> <p><br><strong>Nice to have:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Hands-on experience in Robotics, AI, and/or Computer Vision.</li> <li>Intellectual curiosity, empathy, and ability to operate with a high degree of autonomy.</li> <li>Experience building and/or maintaining lab networks and data pipelines.</li> <li>Experience running large-scale data collection and controlled experiments</li> <li>Experience in logistics.</li> </ul><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p><em>Compensation packages at Scale for eligible roles include base salary, equity, and benefits. raw_text: Job Title: Data Analyst, GenAI Marketplace. Description: <p>Scale is looking for a Senior Data Analyst to help advance AI development in the Generative AI sector. This role will partner with leadership, operators, and engineers in our Growth Operations team to help unpack ambiguous problems and build lasting, scalable analytics solutions. Your work will directly evolve how Scale operates and measures its growth strategies, funnels, and pipelines. The ideal candidate is detail oriented, rigorous about validating results, talented at distilling down complexity, and loves tackling and solving hard problems.</p> <h2><strong>You will:</strong></h2> <ul> <li>Build scalable data assets (dashboards and underlying data models and workflows) to unlock reliable data analytics and insights for growth leads</li> <li>Add contextual layer to data to enable and educate stakeholders on leveraging new data assets that you create</li> <li>Be a proactive partner to your business stakeholders and provide insights and conclusions rather than just data outputs</li> <li>Be a thought partner with the broader Growth organization to simplify and improve existing data assets&nbsp;</li> <li>Deploy AI agents to streamline analytics, creating self serve capabilities</li> <li>Tackle business critical questions by developing hypotheses and testing and iterating on interim results</li> <li>Partner with Data Engineers, Data Scientists, and cross-functional stakeholders to develop business metrics to understand our current performance and influence our roadmaps</li> </ul> <h2><strong>Ideally You'd Have:</strong></h2> <ul> <li>3+ years of industry experience in a highly analytical role</li> <li>Degree in a quantitative field (e.g., Math, Stats,&nbsp; Engineering)</li> <li>Expert-level proficiency in writing complex, highly-optimized SQL queries across large datasets.</li> <li>Expert knowledge in using and communicating through BI tools like Tableau</li> <li>Working knowledge of Python and associated data libraries</li> <li>Excellent communication and presentation skills to&nbsp; executives</li> <li>Expertise at both defining the right metrics as well as diagnosing and understanding data inconsistencies</li> </ul><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p><em>Compensation packages at Scale for eligible roles include base salary, equity, and benefits. The range displayed on each job posting reflects the minimum and maximum target for new hire salaries for the position, determined by work location and additional factors, including job-related skills, experience, interview performance, and relevant education or training. Scale employees in eligible roles are also granted equity based compensation, subject to Board of Director approval. Your recruiter can share more about the specific salary range for your preferred location during the hiring process, and confirm whether the hired role will be eligible for equity grant. You’ll also receive benefits including, but not limited to: Comprehensive health, dental and vision coverage, retirement benefits, a learning and development stipend, and generous PTO. Additionally, this role may be eligible for additional benefits such as a commuter stipend.</em></p></div><div class="title">Please reference the job posting's subtitle for where this position will be located. For pay transparency purposes, the base salary range for this full-time position in the locations of San Francisco, New York, Seattle is:</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$149,600</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$187,000 USD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><p><strong><em>PLEASE NOTE:&nbsp;</em></strong><em>Our policy requires a 90-day waiting period before reconsidering candidates for the same role. This allows us to ensure a fair and thorough evaluation of all applicants.</em></p> <p><strong>About Us:</strong></p> <p><em>At Scale, our mission is to develop reliable AI systems for the world's most important decisions. Our products provide the high-quality data and full-stack technologies that power the world's leading models, and help enterprises and governments build, deploy, and oversee AI applications that deliver real impact. We work closely with industry leaders like Meta, Cisco, DLA Piper, Mayo Clinic, Time Inc., the Government of Qatar, and U.S. government agencies including the Army and Air Force. We are expanding our team to accelerate the development of AI applications.</em></p> <p><em>We believe that everyone should be able to bring their whole selves to work, which is why we are proud to be an inclusive and equal opportunity workplace. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability status, gender identity or Veteran status.&nbsp;</em></p> <p><em>We are committed to working with and providing reasonable accommodations to applicants with physical and mental disabilities. If you need assistance and/or a reasonable accommodation in the application or recruiting process due to a disability, please contact us at accommodations@scale.com. Please see the United States Department of Labor's </em><a href="https://www.eeoc.gov/sites/default/files/2023-06/22-088_EEOC_KnowYourRights6.12ScreenRdr.pdf"><em>Know Your Rights poster</em></a><em> for additional information.</em></p> <p><em>We comply with the United States Department of Labor's </em><a href="https://www.dol.gov/sites/dolgov/files/ofccp/pdf/pay-transp_English_unformattedESQA508c.pdf"><em>Pay Transparency provision</em></a><em>.&nbsp;</em></p> <p><em><strong>PLEASE NOTE: </strong>We collect, retain and use personal data for our professional business purposes, including notifying you of job opportunities that may be of interest and sharing with our affiliates. raw_text: Job Title: Data Collection Program Manager, Robotics. Description: <div> <div> <p>Scale AI is seeking a hands-on <strong>Data Collection Program Manager</strong> to own and optimize contributor-facing workflows across hardware, rigs, and physical logistics. This role blends program management, operational problem-solving, and process ownership to ensure smooth execution of complex, work stream projects.</p> <p>You’ll coordinate contributors, manage hardware and rig logistics, and improve SOPs while solving real-world challenges at the intersection of digital and physical workflows. This role is ideal for someone who thrives in operationally complex environments and wants ownership over end-to-end execution.</p> </div> </div> <h3><strong>You will:</strong></h3> <ul> <li>Coordinate contributors across multiple operational workflows (no direct reports)</li> <li>Manage hardware and rig logistics to ensure timely, accurate delivery and setup</li> <li>Own SOPs and operational processes, continuously iterating to improve efficiency</li> <li>Solve hands-on problems spanning both digital and physical workflows</li> <li>Track workstreams, identify bottlenecks, and proactively implement solutions</li> <li>Collaborate with cross-functional teams (Engineering, Product, Procurement, Data) to ensure seamless execution</li> <li>Build reporting and feedback loops to provide transparency and inform leadership decisions</li> <li>5 days in office&nbsp;</li> </ul> <h3><strong>Ideally you'd have:</strong></h3> <ul> <li>3–5+ years as a strong Operations or Program Manager with exposure to hardware, logistics, or physical workflows</li> <li>Experience coordinating multiple work streams simultaneously</li> <li>Hands-on problem solver with a bias toward action</li> <li>Comfortable working in a contributor-facing, on-site operational environment</li> <li>Strong organizational skills with the ability to design scalable processes</li> <li>Experience improving processes and SOPs for operational efficiency</li> </ul> <h3><strong>Nice to haves:</strong></h3> <ul> <li>Experience in hardware operations, rig setup, or warehouse/logistics environments</li> <li>Familiarity with workflow or project management tools</li> <li>Exposure to cross-functional collaboration across engineering, product, or operations teams</li> </ul><div class="content-conclusion"><p><strong><em>PLEASE NOTE:&nbsp;</em></strong><em>Our policy requires a 90-day waiting period before reconsidering candidates for the same role. This allows us to ensure a fair and thorough evaluation of all applicants.</em></p> <p><strong>About Us:</strong></p> <p><em>At Scale, our mission is to develop reliable AI systems for the world's most important decisions. Our products provide the high-quality data and full-stack technologies that power the world's leading models, and help enterprises and governments build, deploy, and oversee AI applications that deliver real impact. We work closely with industry leaders like Meta, Cisco, DLA Piper, Mayo Clinic, Time Inc., the Government of Qatar, and U.S. government agencies including the Army and Air Force. We are expanding our team to accelerate the development of AI applications.</em></p> <p><em>We believe that everyone should be able to bring their whole selves to work, which is why we are proud to be an inclusive and equal opportunity workplace. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability status, gender identity or Veteran status.&nbsp;</em></p> <p><em>We are committed to working with and providing reasonable accommodations to applicants with physical and mental disabilities. raw_text: Job Title: Deal Desk & Pricing Manager. Description: <p>Deal Desk &amp; Pricing drives mission-critical initiatives within our Finance team as we look to build a sustainable and scalable sales engine to power Scale’s continued growth. Initiatives range from developing pricing &amp; packaging strategy for new products, to building internal deal and pricing processes, to technical and commercial deal scoping and proposal creation.&nbsp;</p> <p>As a Deal Desk &amp; Pricing Manager, you will be joining the Sales Operations &amp; Strategy team and will have the opportunity to directly shape our rapidly growing sales organization. You will work closely with Sales and Finance leadership, including our SVP of Sales &amp; Chief Financial Officer, and will play a key role in aligning the go-to-market team to ensure success in our goals and mission. We are looking for highly motivated generalists who combine an empathetic interpersonal style and analytical rigor to drive clear outcomes. If you enjoy building strong relationships and solving complex problems in an energetic and fast-paced environment, we would love to hear from you! Each day in the life at Scale is different and we promise you will never be bored.</p> <p>What you’ll be doing:</p> <ul> <li>Own and drive end-to-end internal deal crafting from initial modeling through to contract review with sales management, reps, and other internal stakeholders</li> <li>Tackle ambiguous, open-ended questions around our go-to-market motion, and quickly implement and iterate on solutions that deliver measurable results</li> <li>Support Sales and Finance leadership in quarterly strategy and planning, including forecasting and P&amp;L analysis</li> <li>Help incubate, scope, and execute on new initiatives around pricing strategy, deal modeling, proposal creation, and value engineering</li> <li>Be the trusted partner and advisor to the sales team at Scale</li> </ul> <p>What we’re looking for:</p> <ul> <li>A penchant for digging deep into data, thinking from first principles, and exercising sound judgment in the face of ambiguity</li> <li>A strong orientation towards driving outcomes, and experience building process and aligning cross-functional stakeholders to deliver results</li> <li>An easygoing interpersonal style and the ability to work and build relationships with a wide range of people</li> <li>A keen interest in sales, deals, and commercial transactions</li> <li>Excellent qualitative and quantitative analytical skills</li> <li>Strong knowledge of Google Suite, MS Office; strong modeling skills with a high attention to detail</li> <li>3+ years of experience in management consulting, finance, or a high-growth startup</li> </ul> <p>Nice-to-haves:</p> <ul> <li>Experience with B2B sales organizations and the ability to understand and navigate complex enterprise sales cycles</li> <li>Familiarity with Tableau and SQL</li> <li>Comfort with sales software and tooling such as Salesforce</li> <li>Interest in being a culture carrier and helping to set the tone of a new team</li> </ul><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p><em>Compensation packages at Scale for eligible roles include base salary, equity, and benefits. The range displayed on each job posting reflects the minimum and maximum target for new hire salaries for the position, determined by work location and additional factors, including job-related skills, experience, interview performance, and relevant education or training. Scale employees in eligible roles are also granted equity based compensation, subject to Board of Director approval. Your recruiter can share more about the specific salary range for your preferred location during the hiring process, and confirm whether the hired role will be eligible for equity grant. You’ll also receive benefits including, but not limited to: Comprehensive health, dental and vision coverage, retirement benefits, a learning and development stipend, and generous PTO. Additionally, this role may be eligible for additional benefits such as a commuter stipend.</em></p></div><div class="title">Please reference the job posting's subtitle for where this position will be located. For pay transparency purposes, the base salary range for this full-time position in the locations of San Francisco and New York is:</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$134,400</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$168,000 USD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><p><strong><em>PLEASE NOTE:&nbsp;</em></strong><em>Our policy requires a 90-day waiting period before reconsidering candidates for the same role. This allows us to ensure a fair and thorough evaluation of all applicants.</em></p> <p><strong>About Us:</strong></p> <p><em>At Scale, our mission is to develop reliable AI systems for the world's most important decisions. Our products provide the high-quality data and full-stack technologies that power the world's leading models, and help enterprises and governments build, deploy, and oversee AI applications that deliver real impact. We work closely with industry leaders like Meta, Cisco, DLA Piper, Mayo Clinic, Time Inc., the Government of Qatar, and U.S. government agencies including the Army and Air Force. We are expanding our team to accelerate the development of AI applications.</em></p> <p><em>We believe that everyone should be able to bring their whole selves to work, which is why we are proud to be an inclusive and equal opportunity workplace. Please see our <a href="https://scale.com/legal/privacy" target="_blank">privacy policy</a> for additional information.</em></p></div>

raw_text: Job Title: Deep Research Agent Tech Lead. Description: <p><strong>Scale AI</strong> is seeking a highly technical and strategic <strong>Staff / Senior Staff Machine Learning Engineer</strong> to act as the <strong>Tech Lead (TL)</strong> for our next generation of deep research agents for the Enterprise. This high-impact role will drive the technical direction and oversight for <strong>Deep Research Agent Development</strong>, translating cutting-edge research in <strong>Generative AI, Large Language Models (LLMs),</strong> and <strong>Agentic Frameworks</strong> into robust, scalable, and high-impact production systems that enhance enterprise operations, analytics, and core efficiency.</p> <p>The ideal candidate thrives in a fast-paced environment, has a passion for both deep technical work and mentoring, and is capable of setting a long-term technical strategy for a critical domain while maintaining a strong, hands-on delivery focus.</p> <h3><strong>Responsibilities</strong></h3> <h4><strong>Technical Leadership &amp; Vision</strong></h4> <ul> <li><strong>Set the Technical Roadmap:</strong> Define and own the technical strategy, architecture, and roadmap for Deep Research Agents for the Enterprise, ensuring alignment with Scale AI’s overall AI strategy and business goals.</li> <li><strong>Drive Breakthrough Research to Production:</strong> Lead the end-to-end development, from initial research to production deployment, to landing on customer impact, with a focus on <strong>integrating diverse data modalities</strong>.</li> <li><strong>Core Agent Capabilities Development:</strong></li> <ul> <li><strong>Advanced Knowledge Retrieval: </strong>Architect and implement state-of-the-art retrieval systems to ensure the agents provide accurate and comprehensive answers from public and proprietary data sources from enterprises.</li> <li><strong>Data analysis:</strong> Design and champion the development of data analysis agents that accurately translate complex natural language queries into executable SQL/code against diverse enterprise data schemas.</li> <li><strong>Multimodal Intelligence:</strong> Lead the integration of <strong>Multimodal AI</strong> capabilities to process and extract structured information from visual documents, tables, and forms, enriching the agent's knowledge base.</li> </ul> <li><strong>Architecture &amp; Design:</strong> Design and champion highly scalable, reliable, and low-latency infrastructure and frameworks for building, orchestrating, and evaluating multi-agent systems at enterprise scale.</li> <li><strong>Technical Excellence:</strong> Serve as the technical authority for the team, leading design reviews, defining ML engineering best practices, and ensuring code quality, security, and operational excellence for all agent systems.</li> </ul> <h4><strong>Team Leadership &amp; Mentorship</strong></h4> <ul> <li><strong>Lead and Mentor:</strong> Technically lead and mentor a team of Machine Learning Engineers and Research Scientists, fostering a culture of innovation, rigorous engineering, rapid iteration, and technical depth.</li> <li><strong>Recruiting &amp; Growth:</strong> Partner with management to hire, onboard, and grow top-tier talent, helping to shape the long-term structure and capabilities of the team.</li> <li><strong>Cross-Functional Influence:</strong> Collaborate effectively with Product Managers, Data Scientists, and other engineering/science teams to translate ambiguous, high-level business problems into concrete, executable technical specifications and impactful agent solutions.</li> </ul> <h3><strong>Basic Qualifications</strong></h3> <ul> <li>Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, a related field, or equivalent practical experience.</li> <li>8+ years of experience in software development, with at least 6 years focused on <strong>Machine Learning, Deep Learning, or Applied Research</strong> in a production environment.</li> <li>2+ years of experience in a formal or informal <strong>Technical Leadership</strong> role (Team Lead, Tech Lead) with a focus on setting technical direction for a domain.</li> <li>Deep expertise in <strong>Generative AI</strong> and <strong>Large Language Models (LLMs)</strong>.</li> <li>Demonstrated experience designing, building, and deploying <strong>AI Agents</strong> or complex <strong>Agentic systems</strong> in production at scale.</li> <li>Experience with large-scale distributed systems and real-time data processing.</li> </ul> <h3><strong>Preferred Qualifications</strong></h3> <ul> <li>Advanced degree (Master's or Ph.D.) in Computer Science, Machine Learning, or a related quantitative field.</li> <li>Demonstrated experience designing and deploying production-grade Text-to-SQL systems, including handling complex schema linking and query optimization.</li> <li>Practical experience with Multimodal AI, specifically integrating OCR and vision-language models for document intelligence and structured data extraction from images/forms.</li> <li>Proven experience in one or more relevant deep research areas: Reinforcement Learning (RL), Reasoning and Planning, Agentic Systems.</li> <li>Experience with vector databases and advanced retrieval techniques.</li> <li>A track record of publishing research papers in top-tier ML/AI conferences (e.g., NeurIPS, ICML, ICLR, KDD).</li> <li>Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to articulate complex technical vision to executive stakeholders and technical peers.</li> <li>Experience driving cross-team technical initiatives that have delivered significant business impact.</li> </ul><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p><em>Compensation packages at Scale for eligible roles include base salary, equity, and benefits. The range displayed on each job posting reflects the minimum and maximum target for new hire salaries for the position, determined by work location and additional factors, including job-related skills, experience, interview performance, and relevant education or training. Scale employees in eligible roles are also granted equity based compensation, subject to Board of Director approval. Your recruiter can share more about the specific salary range for your preferred location during the hiring process, and confirm whether the hired role will be eligible for equity grant. You’ll also receive benefits including, but not limited to: Comprehensive health, dental and vision coverage, retirement benefits, a learning and development stipend, and generous PTO. Additionally, this role may be eligible for additional benefits such as a commuter stipend.</em></p></div><div class="title">Please reference the job posting's subtitle for where this position will be located. For pay transparency purposes, the base salary range for this full-time position in the locations of San Francisco, New York, Seattle is:</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$252,000</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$315,000 USD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><p><strong><em>PLEASE NOTE:&nbsp;</em></strong><em>Our policy requires a 90-day waiting period before reconsidering candidates for the same role. This allows us to ensure a fair and thorough evaluation of all applicants.</em></p> <p><strong>About Us:</strong></p> <p><em>At Scale, our mission is to develop reliable AI systems for the world's most important decisions. Our products provide the high-quality data and full-stack technologies that power the world's leading models, and help enterprises and governments build, deploy, and oversee AI applications that deliver real impact. We work closely with industry leaders like Meta, Cisco, DLA Piper, Mayo Clinic, Time Inc., the Government of Qatar, and U.S. government agencies including the Army and Air Force. We are expanding our team to accelerate the development of AI applications.</em></p> <p><em>We believe that everyone should be able to bring their whole selves to work, which is why we are proud to be an inclusive and equal opportunity workplace. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability status, gender identity or Veteran status.&nbsp;</em></p> <p><em>We are committed to working with and providing reasonable accommodations to applicants with physical and mental disabilities. If you need assistance and/or a reasonable accommodation in the application or recruiting process due to a disability, please contact us at accommodations@scale.com. Please see the United States Department of Labor's </em><a href="https://www.eeoc.gov/sites/default/files/2023-06/22-088_EEOC_KnowYourRights6.12ScreenRdr.pdf"><em>Know Your Rights poster</em></a><em> for additional information.</em></p> <p><em>We comply with the United States Department of Labor's </em><a href="https://www.dol.gov/sites/dolgov/files/ofccp/pdf/pay-transp_English_unformattedESQA508c.pdf"><em>Pay Transparency provision</em></a><em>.&nbsp;</em></p> <p><em><strong>PLEASE NOTE: </strong>We collect, retain and use personal data for our professional business purposes, including notifying you of job opportunities that may be of interest and sharing with our affiliates. We limit the personal data we collect to that which we believe is appropriate and necessary to manage applicants’ needs, provide our services, and comply with applicable laws. Any information we collect in connection with your application will be treated in accordance with our internal policies and programs designed to protect personal data. Please see our <a href="https://scale.com/legal/privacy" target="_blank">privacy policy</a> for additional information.</em></p></div>

raw_text: Job Title: DevOps Engineer, IPS. Description: <p>Scale’s rapidly growing International Public Sector team is focused on using AI to address critical challenges facing the public sector around the world. Our core work consists of:</p> <ul> <li>Creating custom AI applications that will impact millions of citizens</li> <li>Generating high-quality training data for national LLMs</li> <li>Upskilling and advisory services to spread the impact of AI</li> </ul> <p>As a DevOps Engineer, you will design and develop core platforms and software systems, while supporting orchestration, data abstraction, data pipelines, identity &amp; access management, security tools, and underlying cloud infrastructure.</p> <p>At Scale, we’re not just building AI solutions—we’re enabling the public sector to transform their operations and better serve citizens through cutting-edge technology. If you’re ready to shape the future of AI in the public sector and be a founding member of our team, we’d love to hear from you.</p> <p><strong>You will:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Backend Development and System Ownership: Design and implement secure, scalable backend systems for customers using modern, cloud-native AI infrastructure. Own services or systems, define long-term health goals, and improve the health of surrounding components.</li> <li>Collaboration and Standards: Collaborate with cross-functional teams to define and execute backend and infrastructure solutions tailored for secure environments. Enhance engineering standards, tooling, and processes to maintain high-quality outputs.</li> <li>Infrastructure Automation and Management: Write, maintain, and enhance Infrastructure as Code templates (e.g., Terraform, CloudFormation) for automated provisioning and management. Manage networking architecture, including secure VPCs, VPNs, load balancers, and firewalls, in cloud environments.</li> <li>Deployment and Scalability: Design and optimize CI/CD pipelines for efficient testing, building, and deployment processes. Scale and optimize containerized applications using orchestration platforms like Kubernetes to ensure high availability and reliability.</li> <li>Disaster Recovery and Hybrid Strategies: Develop and test disaster recovery plans with robust backups and failover mechanisms. Design and implement hybrid and multi-cloud strategies to support workloads across on-premises and multiple cloud providers.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Ideally you’d have:</strong></p> <ul> <li>A strong engineering background, with a Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Mathematics, or a related quantitative field (or equivalent practical experience)</li> <li>5+ years of post-graduation engineering experience, with a focus on back-end systems and proficiency in at least one of Python, Typescript, Javascript, or C++</li> <li>Extensive experience in software development and a deep understanding of distributed systems and public cloud platforms (AWS and Azure preferred)</li> <li>Track record of independent ownership of successful engineering projects</li> <li>Experience working fluently with standard containerization &amp; deployment technologies like Kubernetes, Terraform, Docker, etc.</li> <li>Strong knowledge of software engineering best practices and CI/CD tooling (CircleCI, Github Actions)</li> <li>Solid foundation and real-world experience in network engineering</li> </ul> <p><strong>Nice to haves:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Experience working cross functionally with operations</li> <li>Experience building solutions with LLMs and a deep understanding of the overall Gen AI landscape</li> <li>Experience with data warehouses (Snowflake, Firebolt) and data pipeline/ETL tools (Dagster, dbt)</li> <li>Experience with authentication/authorization systems (Zanzibar, Authz, etc.)</li> <li>Experience with NoSQL document databases (MongoDB) and structured databases (Postgres)</li> <li>Experience with hybrid or on-prem systems</li> <li>Experience with orchestration platforms, such as Temporal and AWS Step Functions</li> </ul><div class="content-conclusion"><p><strong><em>PLEASE NOTE:&nbsp;</em></strong><em>Our policy requires a 90-day waiting period before reconsidering candidates for the same role. cleaned_text: Job Title: DevOps Engineer, IPS. Description: <p>Scale’s rapidly growing International Public Sector team is focused on using AI to address critical challenges facing the public sector around the world. Our core work consists of:</p> <ul> <li>Creating custom AI applications that will impact millions of citizens</li> <li>Generating high-quality training data for national LLMs</li> <li>Upskilling and advisory services to spread the impact of AI</li> </ul> <p>As a DevOps Engineer, you will design and develop core platforms and software systems, while supporting orchestration, data abstraction, data pipelines, identity &amp; access management, security tools, and underlying cloud infrastructure.</p> <p>At Scale, we’re not just building AI solutions—we’re enabling the public sector to transform their operations and better serve citizens through cutting-edge technology. If you’re ready to shape the future of AI in the public sector and be a founding member of our team, we’d love to hear from you.</p> <p><strong>You will:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Backend Development and System Ownership: Design and implement secure, scalable backend systems for customers using modern, cloud-native AI infrastructure. Own services or systems, define long-term health goals, and improve the health of surrounding components.</li> <li>Collaboration and Standards: Collaborate with cross-functional teams to define and execute backend and infrastructure solutions tailored for secure environments. Enhance engineering standards, tooling, and processes to maintain high-quality outputs.</li> <li>Infrastructure Automation and Management: Write, maintain, and enhance Infrastructure as Code templates (e.g., Terraform, CloudFormation) for automated provisioning and management. Manage networking architecture, including secure VPCs, VPNs, load balancers, and firewalls, in cloud environments.</li> <li>Deployment and Scalability: Design and optimize CI/CD pipelines for efficient testing, building, and deployment processes. Our products provide the high-quality data and full-stack technologies that power the world's leading models, and help enterprises and governments build, deploy, and oversee AI applications that deliver real impact. raw_text: Job Title: Director, Applied AI Engineering- Enterprise. Description: <p>Following a record-breaking Q4 2025—our strongest revenue quarter to date, with Enterprise delivering our largest bookings ever—we are accelerating enterprise adoption of frontier data and models through complex, production-grade AI agents.</p> <p>The Applied AI team works on the front lines of the AI revolution, partnering deeply with customers to identify high-impact business problems and build cutting-edge AI systems using Scale’s proprietary research, data, and infrastructure—unlocking domain expertise through high-quality data and expert feedback.</p> <p>As <strong>Director of Applied AI</strong>, you will own the strategy, execution, and growth of a high-impact organization, working directly with some of the world’s most sophisticated enterprises to translate generative AI breakthroughs into measurable business outcomes through team building, technical leadership, and deep customer partnerships.</p> <p>This role is ideal for a leader who thrives in ambiguity, understands both frontier GenAI capabilities and their limitations, and is motivated by turning research into durable, production-ready systems.</p> <h3><strong>What You’ll Do</strong></h3> <ul> <li><strong>Drive enterprise impact with GenAI</strong>: Partner directly with customers to identify high-leverage opportunities for generative AI, design solutions, and deliver production systems that create clear business value.</li> <li><strong>Lead and scale a GenAI-native Applied AI organization</strong>: Build, mentor, and manage multiple teams of Applied AI Engineers and ML Engineers who are native to modern GenAI technologies, agentic systems, and multimodal models.</li> <li><strong>Set technical and strategic direction</strong>: Define best practices for agent development, evaluation, deployment, and iteration across customer engagements and internal product efforts.</li> <li><strong>Bridge frontier research to real-world applications</strong>: Translate advances in LLMs, multimodal models, and agentic workflows into practical, scalable solutions across industries.</li> <li><strong>Discover model limitations and inspire innovation</strong>: Identify failure modes, inefficiencies, and gaps in current models; use these insights to influence internal research, product roadmaps, and customer strategy.</li> <li><strong>Partner cross-functionally</strong>: Work closely with Product, Research, Sales, and Leadership to shape Applied AI offerings, prioritize investments, and guide long-term platform evolution.</li> <li><strong>Influence the broader AI ecosystem</strong>: Represent Scale’s Applied AI capabilities with customers and partners, and help position Scale as a trusted leader in enterprise GenAI deployment.<br><br></li> </ul> <h3><strong>What We’re Looking For</strong></h3> <h3><strong>Core Qualifications</strong></h3> <ul> <li>8+ years of experience building, deploying, and scaling ML systems in production, including Enterprise-grade Gen AI and agentic applications</li> <li>6+ years of people leadership experience, including managing managers and leading multi-team organizations delivering customer-facing AI products</li> <li>Deep applied expertise in Gen AI, including LLM-based systems, agent orchestration, evaluation and reliability frameworks, and production system design&nbsp;</li> <li>Experience owning end-to-end AI product delivery—from problem definition and technical architecture to deployment, iteration, and scaling</li> <li>Strong technical judgment across software engineering, system design, and applied ML fundamentals</li> <li>Exceptional communication and stakeholder management skills, with the ability to influence executives, customers, and cross-functional partners</li> <li>Bachelor’s degree required; Master’s or PhD in Computer Science or a related field strongly preferred<br><br></li> </ul> <h3><strong>Nice to Have</strong></h3> <ul> <li>Hands-on experience building and deploying agent-based, tool-augmented, or workflow-driven LLM systems in enterprise environments</li> <li>Prior ownership of enterprise AI platforms, internal ML products, or customer-facing AI services at scale</li> <li>Proven track record of partnering directly with enterprises to identify high-impact use cases and deliver measurable business outcomes<br><br></li> </ul> <h3><strong>Why This Role Matters</strong></h3> <p>As Director of Applied AI, you will play a critical role in shaping how enterprises adopt, deploy, and trust generative AI at scale. You will build and lead teams that set the standard for applied GenAI and agentic systems, translate frontier capabilities into reliable, production-ready solutions, and deliver measurable business impact for customers. By uncovering model limitations and guiding how AI is applied in real-world environments, you will influence both product direction and the next wave of enterprise AI innovation.</p> <p><br><br></p><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p><em>Compensation packages at Scale for eligible roles include base salary, equity, and benefits. The range displayed on each job posting reflects the minimum and maximum target for new hire salaries for the position, determined by work location and additional factors, including job-related skills, experience, interview performance, and relevant education or training. Scale employees in eligible roles are also granted equity based compensation, subject to Board of Director approval. Your recruiter can share more about the specific salary range for your preferred location during the hiring process, and confirm whether the hired role will be eligible for equity grant. You’ll also receive benefits including, but not limited to: Comprehensive health, dental and vision coverage, retirement benefits, a learning and development stipend, and generous PTO. Additionally, this role may be eligible for additional benefits such as a commuter stipend.</em></p></div><div class="title">Please reference the job posting's subtitle for where this position will be located. For pay transparency purposes, the base salary range for this full-time position in the locations of San Francisco, New York, Seattle is:</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$285,200</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$356,500 USD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><p><strong><em>PLEASE NOTE:&nbsp;</em></strong><em>Our policy requires a 90-day waiting period before reconsidering candidates for the same role. This allows us to ensure a fair and thorough evaluation of all applicants.</em></p> <p><strong>About Us:</strong></p> <p><em>At Scale, our mission is to develop reliable AI systems for the world's most important decisions. Our products provide the high-quality data and full-stack technologies that power the world's leading models, and help enterprises and governments build, deploy, and oversee AI applications that deliver real impact. We work closely with industry leaders like Meta, Cisco, DLA Piper, Mayo Clinic, Time Inc., the Government of Qatar, and U.S. government agencies including the Army and Air Force. We are expanding our team to accelerate the development of AI applications.</em></p> <p><em>We believe that everyone should be able to bring their whole selves to work, which is why we are proud to be an inclusive and equal opportunity workplace. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability status, gender identity or Veteran status.&nbsp;</em></p> <p><em>We are committed to working with and providing reasonable accommodations to applicants with physical and mental disabilities. If you need assistance and/or a reasonable accommodation in the application or recruiting process due to a disability, please contact us at accommodations@scale.com. Please see the United States Department of Labor's </em><a href="https://www.eeoc.gov/sites/default/files/2023-06/22-088_EEOC_KnowYourRights6.12ScreenRdr.pdf"><em>Know Your Rights poster</em></a><em> for additional information.</em></p> <p><em>We comply with the United States Department of Labor's </em><a href="https://www.dol.gov/sites/dolgov/files/ofccp/pdf/pay-transp_English_unformattedESQA508c.pdf"><em>Pay Transparency provision</em></a><em>.&nbsp;</em></p> <p><em><strong>PLEASE NOTE: </strong>We collect, retain and use personal data for our professional business purposes, including notifying you of job opportunities that may be of interest and sharing with our affiliates. We limit the personal data we collect to that which we believe is appropriate and necessary to manage applicants’ needs, provide our services, and comply with applicable laws. Any information we collect in connection with your application will be treated in accordance with our internal policies and programs designed to protect personal data. Please see our <a href="https://scale.com/legal/privacy" target="_blank">privacy policy</a> for additional information.</em></p></div>
