raw_text: Job Title: Engineering Manager, AgentOps. Description: <p>At Scale AI, our mission is to accelerate the development of AI applications. For 8 years, Scale has been the leading AI data foundry, helping fuel the most exciting advancements in AI, including: generative AI, defense applications, and autonomous vehicles. With our recent Series F round, we’re accelerating the abundance of frontier data to pave the road to Artificial General Intelligence (AGI), and building upon our prior model evaluation work with enterprise customers and governments, to deepen our capabilities and offerings for both public and private evaluations.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>About Data Engine</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>Our Generative AI Data Engine powers the world’s most advanced LLMs and generative models through world-class RLHF (Reinforcement Learning with Human Feedback), human data generation, model evaluation, safety, and alignment. The data we are producing is some of the most important work for how humanity will interact with AI.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>About our AgentOps team:&nbsp;</p> <p>The vision for the AgentOps team is to build the best Agent Development Platform in the AI Industry.</p> <p>Agent Development is in its nascent stages in a rapidly changing industry, with limited tooling making it hard for agent developers to manage agent lifecycles. As a team that has a front-row seat to what Enterprise customers need and want, we want to build an opinionated but flexible platform for all Agent operations ("AgentOps"), including building, deploying, monitoring, evaluating and improving agents to solve customer needs.</p> <p>With the AI industry currently moving towards RL workflows that need verifiable rewards, we further want to gear this platform towards knowledge capture that create compounding effects to make Agents more effective and capable. We want to create a virtuous data flywheel where agents built using this platform see continuous performance improvements and increase customer value over time.</p> <p>We are a rapidly growing team with ambitious goals, and are looking for motivated individuals to join us to make an impact in a green-field domain.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>Responsibilities:</p> <ul> <li>Manage the engineering team and drive technical delivery</li> <li>Comfortable working cross functionally, whether that be internal or external customers</li> <li>Work across the entire product lifecycle from conceptualization through production</li> <li>Build features end-to-end: back-end, system design, debugging and testing</li> <li>Deliver experiments at a high velocity and level of quality to engage our customers</li> <li>Influence the culture, values, and processes of a growing engineering team</li> <li>Inspire and mentor engineers</li> <li>Collaborating with cross-functional teams to define, design, and ship new product features and experiences</li> </ul> <p><br><br></p> <p>Requirements:</p> <ul> <li>At least 5 years of relevant experience and at least 2 years of experience managing engineers is preferred</li> <li>Proven success in leading, managing, and developing high-performing Engineering teams</li> <li>Expertise in identifying product engagement patterns and trends for large scale consumer products</li> <li>Track record of shipping high-quality products and features at scale</li> <li>Desire to work in a very fast-paced environment</li> <li>Ability to turn business and product ideas into engineering solutions</li> <li>Excellent problem-solving skills, and be able to work independently or as part of a team.</li> <li>Excited to join a dynamic, hybrid team in either San Francisco or New York City.</li> </ul><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p><em>Compensation packages at Scale for eligible roles include base salary, equity, and benefits. The range displayed on each job posting reflects the minimum and maximum target for new hire salaries for the position, determined by work location and additional factors, including job-related skills, experience, interview performance, and relevant education or training. Scale employees in eligible roles are also granted equity based compensation, subject to Board of Director approval. Your recruiter can share more about the specific salary range for your preferred location during the hiring process, and confirm whether the hired role will be eligible for equity grant. You’ll also receive benefits including, but not limited to: Comprehensive health, dental and vision coverage, retirement benefits, a learning and development stipend, and generous PTO. Additionally, this role may be eligible for additional benefits such as a commuter stipend.</em></p></div><div class="title">Please reference the job posting's subtitle for where this position will be located. For pay transparency purposes, the base salary range for this full-time position in the locations of San Francisco, New York, Seattle is:</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$216,200</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$270,250 USD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><p><strong><em>PLEASE NOTE:&nbsp;</em></strong><em>Our policy requires a 90-day waiting period before reconsidering candidates for the same role. This allows us to ensure a fair and thorough evaluation of all applicants.</em></p> <p><strong>About Us:</strong></p> <p><em>At Scale, our mission is to develop reliable AI systems for the world's most important decisions. Our products provide the high-quality data and full-stack technologies that power the world's leading models, and help enterprises and governments build, deploy, and oversee AI applications that deliver real impact. We work closely with industry leaders like Meta, Cisco, DLA Piper, Mayo Clinic, Time Inc., the Government of Qatar, and U.S. government agencies including the Army and Air Force. We are expanding our team to accelerate the development of AI applications.</em></p> <p><em>We believe that everyone should be able to bring their whole selves to work, which is why we are proud to be an inclusive and equal opportunity workplace. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability status, gender identity or Veteran status.&nbsp;</em></p> <p><em>We are committed to working with and providing reasonable accommodations to applicants with physical and mental disabilities. If you need assistance and/or a reasonable accommodation in the application or recruiting process due to a disability, please contact us at accommodations@scale.com. Please see the United States Department of Labor's </em><a href="https://www.eeoc.gov/sites/default/files/2023-06/22-088_EEOC_KnowYourRights6.12ScreenRdr.pdf"><em>Know Your Rights poster</em></a><em> for additional information.</em></p> <p><em>We comply with the United States Department of Labor's </em><a href="https://www.dol.gov/sites/dolgov/files/ofccp/pdf/pay-transp_English_unformattedESQA508c.pdf"><em>Pay Transparency provision</em></a><em>.&nbsp;</em></p> <p><em><strong>PLEASE NOTE: </strong>We collect, retain and use personal data for our professional business purposes, including notifying you of job opportunities that may be of interest and sharing with our affiliates. We limit the personal data we collect to that which we believe is appropriate and necessary to manage applicants’ needs, provide our services, and comply with applicable laws. Any information we collect in connection with your application will be treated in accordance with our internal policies and programs designed to protect personal data. Please see our <a href="https://scale.com/legal/privacy" target="_blank">privacy policy</a> for additional information.</em></p></div>

raw_text: Job Title: Engineering Manager, GenAI. Description: <p>At Scale AI, our mission is to accelerate the development of AI applications. For 8 years, Scale has been the leading AI data foundry, helping fuel the most exciting advancements in AI, including: generative AI, defense applications, and autonomous vehicles. With our recent Series F round, we’re accelerating the abundance of frontier data to pave the road to Artificial General Intelligence (AGI), and building upon our prior model evaluation work with enterprise customers and governments, to deepen our capabilities and offerings for both public and private evaluations.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>About Data Engine</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>Our Generative AI Data Engine powers the world’s most advanced LLMs and generative models through world-class agentic data, human data generation, model evaluation, safety, and alignment. The data we are producing is some of the most important work for how humanity will interact with AI.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>Responsibilities:</p> <ul> <li>Manage the engineering team and drive technical delivery</li> <li>Comfortable working cross functionally, whether that be internal or external customers</li> <li>Work across the entire product lifecycle from conceptualization through production</li> <li>Build features end-to-end: front-end, back-end, system design, debugging and testing</li> <li>Deliver experiments at a high velocity and level of quality to engage our customers</li> <li>Influence the culture, values, and processes of a growing engineering team</li> <li>Inspire and mentor engineers</li> <li>Collaborating with cross-functional teams to define, design, and ship new product features and experiences</li> </ul> <p><br><br></p> <p>Requirements:</p> <ul> <li>At least 5 years of relevant experience as a Full Stack Product Engineer and at least 2 years of experience managing engineers is preferred</li> <li>Experience in Java, Python, Javascript, and React</li> <li>Proven success in leading, managing, and developing high-performing Engineering teams</li> <li>Expertise in identifying product engagement patterns and trends for large scale consumer products</li> <li>Track record of shipping high-quality products and features at scale</li> <li>Desire to work in a very fast-paced environment</li> <li>Ability to turn business and product ideas into engineering solutions</li> <li>Excellent problem-solving skills, and be able to work independently or as part of a team.</li> <li>Excited to join a dynamic, hybrid team in either San Francisco or New York City.</li> </ul><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p><em>Compensation packages at Scale for eligible roles include base salary, equity, and benefits. The range displayed on each job posting reflects the minimum and maximum target for new hire salaries for the position, determined by work location and additional factors, including job-related skills, experience, interview performance, and relevant education or training. Scale employees in eligible roles are also granted equity based compensation, subject to Board of Director approval. Your recruiter can share more about the specific salary range for your preferred location during the hiring process, and confirm whether the hired role will be eligible for equity grant. You’ll also receive benefits including, but not limited to: Comprehensive health, dental and vision coverage, retirement benefits, a learning and development stipend, and generous PTO. Additionally, this role may be eligible for additional benefits such as a commuter stipend.</em></p></div><div class="title">Please reference the job posting's subtitle for where this position will be located. For pay transparency purposes, the base salary range for this full-time position in the locations of San Francisco, New York, Seattle is:</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$216,200</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$270,250 USD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><p><strong><em>PLEASE NOTE:&nbsp;</em></strong><em>Our policy requires a 90-day waiting period before reconsidering candidates for the same role. This allows us to ensure a fair and thorough evaluation of all applicants.</em></p> <p><strong>About Us:</strong></p> <p><em>At Scale, our mission is to develop reliable AI systems for the world's most important decisions. Our products provide the high-quality data and full-stack technologies that power the world's leading models, and help enterprises and governments build, deploy, and oversee AI applications that deliver real impact. We work closely with industry leaders like Meta, Cisco, DLA Piper, Mayo Clinic, Time Inc., the Government of Qatar, and U.S. government agencies including the Army and Air Force. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability status, gender identity or Veteran status.&nbsp;</em></p> <p><em>We are committed to working with and providing reasonable accommodations to applicants with physical and mental disabilities. raw_text: Job Title: Engineering Manager, International Public Sector. Description: <p>Scale’s rapidly growing International Public Sector team is focused on using AI to address critical challenges facing the public sector around the world. Our core work consists of:</p> <ul> <li>Creating custom AI applications that will impact millions of citizens</li> <li>Generating high-quality training data for national LLMs</li> <li>Upskilling and advisory services to spread the impact of AI</li> </ul> <p>Our <strong>Scale Generative AI Platform (SGP)</strong> powers production-grade GenAI applications with foundational services, APIs, and infrastructure that accelerate adoption across industries. As more of these applications move from prototype to production, we are investing heavily in the core platform that enables this scale.</p> <p>We are looking for a <strong>technical and strategic Engineering Manager</strong> to lead our <strong>Engineering</strong> efforts Internationally to power custom applications we build for our public sector clients.&nbsp;</p> <p>At Scale, we’re not just building AI solutions—we’re enabling the public sector to transform their operations and better serve citizens through cutting-edge technology. If you’re ready to shape the future of AI in the public sector and be a founding member of our team, we’d love to hear from you.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>You will:</p> <ul> <li>Manage the engineering team and drive technical delivery.</li> <li>Design, build, and optimize backend services for advanced AI-driven applications, focusing on AI agents, evaluation tooling, and automation.</li> <li>Comfortable working cross functionally, whether that be internal or external customers</li> <li>Work across the entire product lifecycle from conceptualization through production</li> <li>Build features end-to-end, system design, debugging and testing</li> <li>Deliver experiments at a high velocity and level of quality to engage our customers</li> <li>Influence the culture, values, and processes of a growing engineering team</li> <li>Inspire and mentor engineers.</li> <li>Collaborating with cross-functional teams to define, design, and ship new product features and experiences</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>Ideally you’d have:</p> <ul> <li>At least 5 years of relevant experience and at least 2 years of experience managing back engineers is preferred</li> <li>Proven success in leading, managing, and developing high-performing Engineering teams</li> <li>Expertise in identifying product engagement patterns and trends for large scale consumer products</li> <li>Track record of shipping high-quality products and features at scale</li> <li>Desire to work in a very fast-paced environment</li> <li>Ability to turn business and product ideas into engineering solutions</li> <li>Excellent problem-solving skills, and be able to work independently or as part of a team</li> </ul><div class="content-conclusion"><p><strong><em>PLEASE NOTE:&nbsp;</em></strong><em>Our policy requires a 90-day waiting period before reconsidering candidates for the same role. Description: <p>Scale AI’s Public Sector business is growing quickly as government agencies adopt AI to support critical national security, defense, and public sector missions. We’re looking for a hands-on <strong>Engineering Manager</strong> to lead a team of software engineers building core products and infrastructure for these customers.</p> <p>This role is ideal for someone who thrives in technical environments, enjoys managing teams while staying close to the code, and wants to work on meaningful problems that impact real world operations across the U.S. government. You’ll play a critical role in delivering backend systems, distributed platforms, and ML tooling used by our public sector partners—all while helping your team grow and execute.</p> <p>You’ll split your time between <strong>technical planning and execution (50%)</strong> and <strong>people management and team development (50%)</strong>, leading a team of 6-8 engineers. You’ll work cross-functionally with product, security, and customer-facing teams to ensure our engineering efforts meet complex federal compliance, security, and performance needs.</p> <p><strong>Must be able to commute to office four times per week:</strong></p> <p><strong>Day to day:</strong></p> <ul> <li>50% Software engineering - technical product planning, and coding</li> <li>50% Managing a growing team.</li> </ul> <p><strong>You will:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Recruit a high-performing engineering team.&nbsp;</li> <li>Drive engineering productivity. Provide guidance, mentorship, and technical leadership to a team of engineers working on Generative AI projects.&nbsp;</li> <li>Collaborating with cross-functional teams to define, design, and execute strategic roadmap.</li> <li>Navigate and deliver outcomes while navigating through complex public sector compliance requirements and frameworks.</li> <li>Design and implement scalable backend systems for Federal customers, leveraging Scale's modern and cloud-native AI infrastructure</li> <li>Develop distributed systems, data-intensive applications, and machine learning infrastructure to enable real impact for mission owners</li> <li>Build robust and reliable backend systems that can serve as standalone products, empowering customers to accelerate their own AI ambitions</li> <li>Participate cleaned_text: Job Title: Engineering Manager, Public Sector . Description: <p>Scale AI’s Public Sector business is growing quickly as government agencies adopt AI to support critical national security, defense, and public sector missions. We’re looking for a hands-on <strong>Engineering Manager</strong> to lead a team of software engineers building core products and infrastructure for these customers.</p> <p>This role is ideal for someone who thrives in technical environments, enjoys managing teams while staying close to the code, and wants to work on meaningful problems that impact real world operations across the U.S. government. You’ll play a critical role in delivering backend systems, distributed platforms, and ML tooling used by our public sector partners—all while helping your team grow and execute.</p> <p>You’ll split your time between <strong>technical planning and execution (50%)</strong> and <strong>people management and team development (50%)</strong>, leading a team of 6-8 engineers. You’ll work cross-functionally with product, security, and customer-facing teams to ensure our engineering efforts meet complex federal compliance, security, and performance needs.</p> <p><strong>Must be able to commute to office four times per week:</strong></p> <p><strong>Day to day:</strong></p> <ul> <li>50% Software engineering - technical product planning, and coding</li> <li>50% Managing a growing team.</li> </ul> <p><strong>You will:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Recruit a high-performing engineering team.&nbsp;</li> <li>Drive engineering productivity. Provide guidance, mentorship, and technical leadership to a team of engineers working on Generative AI projects.&nbsp;</li> <li>Collaborating with cross-functional teams to define, design, and execute strategic roadmap.</li> <li>Navigate and deliver outcomes while navigating through complex public sector compliance requirements and frameworks.</li> <li>Design and implement scalable backend systems for Federal customers, leveraging Scale's modern and cloud-native AI infrastructure</li> <li>Develop distributed systems, data-intensive applications, and machine learning infrastructure to enable real impact for mission owners</li> <li>Build robust and reliable backend systems that can serve as standalone products, empowering customers to accelerate their own AI ambitions</li> <li>Participate actively in customer engagements, working closely with stakeholders to understand requirements and deliver innovative solutions</li> <li>Contribute to the platform roadmap and product strategy for Scale AI's Federal business, playing a key role in shaping the future direction of our offerings</li> <li><strong>Have or ability to obtain a TS/SCI clearance</strong></li> </ul> <p><strong>Ideally you’d have:</strong></p> <ul> <li>5+ years of full-time engineering experience, post-graduation</li> <li>2+ years of prior engineering management or equivalent experience and has managed an engineering team.</li> <li>Have extensive experience in software development</li> <li>Experience scaling products at hyper-growth startups</li> <li>Excitement to work with AI technologies and their applications for the public sector</li> <li>Extremely strong track record as an individual contributor</li> <li>Show a track record of mentoring and leading teams in successful projects</li> <li>Possess excellent communication and collaboration skills, and the ability to translate complex technical concepts to non-technical stakeholders</li> </ul> <p><strong>Nice to haves:</strong></p> <ul> <li>TS/SCI Clearance</li> <li>Deep technical knowledge of Software Development, willing to get deep into the weeds to solve problems alongside the team.</li> <li>Have experience with AI platforms and technologies, including generative models and LLMs.</li> <li>Have previous experience in government or government facing technology roles</li> <li>Experience with cloud-native technologies, full stack development, data engineering, and ml ops infrastructure</li> </ul><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p><em>Compensation packages at Scale for raw_text: Job Title: Engineering Manager, Security. Description: <p>At Scale, our Security Architecture team builds the foundations that allow engineers to ship fast without compromising security. From securing modern TypeScript services and cloud infrastructure to enabling safe adoption of AI-driven systems, our work shapes how products are designed, deployed, and operated across the company. We are looking for a Security Engineering Manager to help define and build the “paved road” for secure development at Scale.</p> <p>As a Security Engineering manager, you will manage a team of Security Engineers that&nbsp; operate as a builder first mentality — roughly 60% software engineering and 40% security. You’ll partner deeply with product, platform, and infrastructure teams to design secure architectures, build shared primitives, and influence how engineering teams work end-to-end. This role requires strong experience in security engineering around pen testing, product/infrastructure security, detention and response.&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>You will:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Partner with product and engineering teams across the full SDLC, from RFC and architecture reviews through implementation, launch, and long-term maintenance.</li> <li>Conduct deep architecture and design, identifying systemic risks beyond individual vulnerabilities.</li> <li>Managing a team that will build and maintain secure cloud and CI/CD foundations using Infrastructure as Code.</li> <li>Act as a technical advisor to engineering teams, helping them ship secure, maintainable, production-grade systems.</li> <li>Influence security strategy and technical direction through tooling, standards, and clear technical guidance.<br><br></li> </ul> <h3><strong>Ideally you’d have:</strong></h3> <ul> <li>Own performance management for Security Engineering teams, setting expectations, evaluating impact, and developing senior talent.&nbsp;</li> <li>Experience conducting security, architecture, and design reviews.</li> <li>Deep familiarity with AWS cloud primitives, including IAM, and experience designing systems for multiple environments.</li> <li>Experience working with Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, CDK, or similar), treating infrastructure as software.</li> <li>Strong ability to structure ambiguous problems and propose pragmatic solutions.</li> <li>Excellent communication skills, with the ability to explain complex security and architectural tradeoffs to technical and non-technical stakeholders.</li> <li>A proven ability to influence cross-functional teams and drive adoption of secure patterns without blocking velocity.<br><br></li> </ul> <h3><strong>Nice to haves:</strong></h3> <ul> <li>Experience working with Kubernetes and container security, including network policies and workload isolation.</li> <li>Experience supporting AI/ML workloads.</li> <li>Familiarity with AI / LLM systems, agentic workflows, and emerging AI security concerns.</li> <li>Experience working in large-scale monorepos or with modern build systems (e.g., Bazel)</li> <li>Exposure to data security, data pipelines, or compliance-driven systems (e.g., GDPR).</li> <li>Willingness to learn and build automation around compliance environments (e.g., FedRAMP, GovCloud).</li> <li>Interest in emerging infrastructure challenges such as GPU or HPC cluster security.</li> </ul><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p><em>Compensation packages at Scale for eligible roles include base salary, equity, and benefits. The range displayed on each job posting reflects the minimum and maximum target for new hire salaries for the position, determined by work location and additional factors, including job-related skills, experience, interview performance, and relevant education or training. Scale employees in eligible roles are also granted equity based compensation, subject to Board of Director approval. Your recruiter can share more about the specific salary range for your preferred location during the hiring process, and confirm whether the hired role will be eligible for equity grant. You’ll also receive benefits including, but not limited to: Comprehensive health, dental and vision coverage, retirement benefits, a learning and development stipend, and generous PTO. Additionally, this role may be eligible for additional benefits such as a commuter stipend.</em></p></div><div class="title">Please reference the job posting's subtitle for where this position will be located. For pay transparency purposes, the base salary range for this full-time position in the locations of San Francisco, New York, Seattle is:</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$248,400</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$310,500 USD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><p><strong><em>PLEASE NOTE:&nbsp;</em></strong><em>Our policy requires a 90-day waiting period before reconsidering candidates for the same role. This allows us to ensure a fair and thorough evaluation of all applicants.</em></p> <p><strong>About Us:</strong></p> <p><em>At Scale, our mission is to develop reliable AI systems for the world's most important decisions. Our products provide the high-quality data and full-stack technologies that power the world's leading models, and help enterprises and governments build, deploy, and oversee AI applications that deliver real impact. We work closely with industry leaders like Meta, Cisco, DLA Piper, Mayo Clinic, Time Inc., the Government of Qatar, and U.S. government agencies including the Army and Air Force. We are expanding our team to accelerate the development of AI applications.</em></p> <p><em>We believe that everyone should be able to bring their whole selves to work, which is why we are proud to be an inclusive and equal opportunity workplace. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability status, gender identity or Veteran status.&nbsp;</em></p> <p><em>We are committed to working with and providing reasonable accommodations to applicants with physical and mental disabilities. If you need assistance and/or a reasonable accommodation in the application or recruiting process due to a disability, please contact us at accommodations@scale.com. Please see the United States Department of Labor's </em><a href="https://www.eeoc.gov/sites/default/files/2023-06/22-088_EEOC_KnowYourRights6.12ScreenRdr.pdf"><em>Know Your Rights poster</em></a><em> for additional information.</em></p> <p><em>We comply with the United States Department of Labor's </em><a href="https://www.dol.gov/sites/dolgov/files/ofccp/pdf/pay-transp_English_unformattedESQA508c.pdf"><em>Pay Transparency provision</em></a><em>.&nbsp;</em></p> <p><em><strong>PLEASE NOTE: </strong>We collect, retain and use personal data for our professional business purposes, including notifying you of job opportunities that may be of interest and sharing with our affiliates. raw_text: Job Title: Enterprise Account Executive. Description: <p>The Enterprise Account Executive will report to the Director of Enterprise GTM and will own revenue growth across a portfolio of Scale AI’s largest and most strategic enterprise customers. This role is focused on selling complex, highly technical AI solutions into F500 organizations, partnering with executive, technical, and operational stakeholders to drive long-term value and expansion.</p> <p>You will be responsible for full-cycle enterprise sales - from prospecting and deal strategy through close, renewal, and expansion - while serving as the quarterback across internal teams including Solutions Engineering, Product, Research, and Operations. This role requires strong ownership, executive presence, and the ability to navigate multi-stakeholder enterprise buying processes in a fast-paced environment.&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>You Will:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Own and drive relationships with Scale’s largest and most complex Fortune 500 prospects and customers</li> <li>Build trusted relationships with executive, technical, and operational stakeholders across multiple business units</li> <li>Develop and execute comprehensive account strategies to drive net-new revenue, expansion, and long-term partnerships</li> <li>Lead strategic deal planning and mutual close plans across new business, renewals, and expansions</li> <li>Partner closely with Solutions Engineering and Product teams to deliver compelling, technically credible value propositions</li> <li>Act as the voice of the customer internally, influencing product roadmap, research priorities, and delivery execution</li> <li>Maintain deep understanding of customer business goals, AI maturity, and industry trends to proactively identify opportunities</li> <li>Consistently communicate account health, pipeline, and forecast accuracy using Salesforce, Clari, and related tools</li> <li>Thrive in a fast-moving, multi-threaded environment while maintaining strong attention to detail and prioritization</li> </ul> <h4>Ideally, You Will Have:</h4> <ul> <li>8+ years of enterprise sales or account management experience, including 2+ years selling deeply technical solutions to both business and technical audiences</li> <li>A proven track record of closing and expanding large, complex enterprise deals&nbsp;</li> <li>Demonstrated success consistently achieving or exceeding quota in enterprise sales roles</li> <li>Experience building and executing long-term account strategies to drive sustained revenue growth</li> <li>Strong ability to lead enterprise renewal processes from strategy through close</li> <li>Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with comfort presenting to executive audiences</li> <li>Strong command of enterprise sales processes and systems (Salesforce, Clari, Outreach, Slack)</li> <li>A consultative, customer-first mindset with the ability to influence cross-functional internal teams</li> <li>Experience developing executive-level materials and business cases</li> <li>Strong project management, organizational skills, and attention to detail</li> <li>Technical background or strong technical curiosity highly valued, especially familiarity with AI, ML, or data platforms</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><em>Sales Commission: This role is eligible to earn commissions.</em></p> <p>&nbsp;</p><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p><em>Compensation packages at Scale for eligible roles include base salary, equity, and benefits. The range displayed on each job posting reflects the minimum and maximum target for new hire salaries for the position, determined by work location and additional factors, including job-related skills, experience, interview performance, and relevant education or training. Scale employees in eligible roles are also granted equity based compensation, subject to Board of Director approval. Your recruiter can share more about the specific salary range for your preferred location during the hiring process, and confirm whether the hired role will be eligible for equity grant. You’ll also receive benefits including, but not limited to: Comprehensive health, dental and vision coverage, retirement benefits, a learning and development stipend, and generous PTO. Additionally, this role may be eligible for additional benefits such as a commuter stipend.</em></p></div><div class="title">Please reference the job posting's subtitle for where this position will be located. For pay transparency purposes, the base salary range for this full-time position in the locations of San Francisco, New York, Seattle is:</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$134,400</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$168,000 USD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><p><strong><em>PLEASE NOTE:&nbsp;</em></strong><em>Our policy requires a 90-day waiting period before reconsidering candidates for the same role. This allows us to ensure a fair and thorough evaluation of all applicants.</em></p> <p><strong>About Us:</strong></p> <p><em>At Scale, our mission is to develop reliable AI systems for the world's most important decisions. Our products provide the high-quality data and full-stack technologies that power the world's leading models, and help enterprises and governments build, deploy, and oversee AI applications that deliver real impact. We work closely with industry leaders like Meta, Cisco, DLA Piper, Mayo Clinic, Time Inc., the Government of Qatar, and U.S. government agencies including the Army and Air Force. We are expanding our team to accelerate the development of AI applications.</em></p> <p><em>We believe that everyone should be able to bring their whole selves to work, which is why we are proud to be an inclusive and equal opportunity workplace. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability status, gender identity or Veteran status.&nbsp;</em></p> <p><em>We are committed to working with and providing reasonable accommodations to applicants with physical and mental disabilities. raw_text: Job Title: Executive Assistant. Description: <p>As we accelerate the development of AI, we’re investing in the growth of our team and looking for an Executive Assistant to support our senior leaders across the CFO, Data, Technology and Systems teams. You will act as a strategic partner who can ensure our leadership stays focused on high-impact goals while you handle the complex logistics, internal communications, and project management that keep the wheels turning. We’re looking for someone who can anticipate and adapt to leaders’ needs, act quickly in the event of any changes, and operate autonomously or with limited direction.</p> <p><strong>You will:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Help to support the day to day of 2-3 members of the leadership team</li> <li>Manage complex calendars and schedules for the team, including coordinating meetings, managing requests, and prioritizing commitments</li> <li>Book travel including flights, accommodations, and transportation</li> <li>Handle high-level administrative tasks such as email management, expenses, document preparation, and team administration</li> <li>Build strong relationships with other Executive Assistants, Chiefs of Staff, and other internal partners&nbsp;</li> <li>Coordinate and plan team initiatives and activities (e.g.Team All Hands, off-sites, team social events, etc.)</li> <li>Manage confidential information with utmost discretion and professionalism</li> </ul> <p><strong>Ideally you’d have:</strong></p> <ul> <li>BA / BS degree or equivalent work experience</li> <li>7+ years of experience as an executive assistant in a fast-paced environment, preferably in the tech or AI industry</li> <li>Exceptional organizational and time management skills</li> <li>Strong communication skills, both written and spoken</li> <li>Experience in working flexibly and adapting to changing priorities, with multiple stakeholders involved</li> <li>Proficiency in office productivity tools and the ability to learn new software quickly</li> </ul><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p><em>Compensation packages at Scale for eligible roles include base salary, equity, and benefits. raw_text: Job Title: Executive Assistant, International Public Sector . Description: <div> <p>Scale AI is seeking a highly skilled Executive Assistant based in London to support the Head International Public Sector in their day to day role, plus ad-hoc support to the IPS LT team. This role is crucial in ensuring smooth operations and effective communication both internally and externally. This person will be able to quickly pick-up on each executive’s preferences, act autonomously or with little direction and will be able to act quickly in the event of any changes.&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>Responsibilities</strong></p> <ul> <li>Manage complex calendars and schedules for the team, including coordinating meetings, track travel and manage requests, and prioritizing commitments with team members</li> <li>Book travel including flights, accommodation and transportation</li> <li>Book any requested bookings for things like client meals, events, etc.</li> <li>Act as a primary point of contact for internal and external stakeholders, including clients, partners, and government ministries</li> <li>Building strong relationships with key EAs and Chiefs of Staffs of priority customers</li> <li>Handle high-level administrative tasks such as email management, expenses, document preparation and team administration</li> <li>Coordinate and plan internal team events, off-site meetings, and company initiatives</li> <li>Manage any office-related items like ordering/stocking snacks and beverages, guest visits, etc.</li> <li>Ensuring the office is running smoothly and liaising with the building management for any issues</li> <li>Organise and run team social events. Keeping the events varied, but within set budgets</li> <li>Manage confidential information with utmost discretion and professionalism</li> </ul> <p><strong>Qualifications</strong></p> <ul> <li>5+ years of experience as an executive assistant in a fast-paced environment, preferably in the tech or AI industry</li> <li>Exceptional organizational and time-management skills</li> <li>Strong communication skills, both written and spoken</li> <li>Proficiency in office productivity tools and ability to learn new software quickly</li> <li>Experience in building and managing relationships with high-level external stakeholders, including government officials</li> <li>Ability to work flexibly and adapt to changing priorities with multiple stakeholders involved</li> </ul> </div><div class="content-conclusion"><p><strong><em>PLEASE NOTE:&nbsp;</em></strong><em>Our policy requires a 90-day waiting period before reconsidering candidates for the same role. raw_text: Job Title: Facilities Operations Manager, Robotics. Description: <div> <div> <p>Scale AI is at the forefront of enabling machine learning for advanced robotics systems. We’re looking for a <strong>hands-on Collection Space / Workplace Manager</strong> to own and optimize our physical collection spaces while driving operational excellence in our on-site workflows.</p> <p>You’ll lead a small team, manage inventory and layouts, coordinate vendors, and create systems that turn physical chaos into scalable, repeatable operations — all while supporting the delivery of high-quality datasets for robotics platforms.</p> </div> </div> <h3><strong>You will:</strong></h3> <ul> <li>Plan, maintain, and evolve collection spaces and workflows</li> <li>Lead a small on-site team (3–6 team members) responsible for setup, teardown, and resets</li> <li>Manage inventory: tracking, storage, audits, and buy vs. dispose decisions</li> <li>Coordinate with vendors to support operations and space management</li> <li>Drive operational processes for data creation, quality, and delivery</li> <li>Improve processes and tools; run pilots, tests, and iterate on solutions</li> <li>Build reporting and feedback loops to inform leadership and cross-functional teams</li> </ul> <h3><strong>Ideally you'd have:</strong></h3> <ul> <li>3–5+ years in facilities, warehouse operations, workplace operations, supply chain, or related roles</li> <li>Experience managing inventory, vendors, and on-site teams</li> <li>Strong organizational instincts and ability to design scalable systems</li> <li>Experience improving processes and running pilots or experiments</li> <li>Hands-on, action-oriented mindset with a bias toward execution</li> <li>Familiarity with basic EHS practices in logistics or warehouse environments</li> <li style="font-weight: bold;"><strong>5 days in office&nbsp;</strong></li> </ul> <h3><strong>Nice to haves:</strong></h3> <ul> <li>Undergraduate degree in Engineering, Economics, or analytics-heavy field; graduate degree preferred</li> <li>Experience with SQL, Python, or Mode Notepad scripting</li> <li>Consulting or supply chain/operations experience</li> <li>Prior experience mentoring or managing a team or have lead a project</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p><div class="content-conclusion"><p><strong><em>PLEASE NOTE:&nbsp;</em></strong><em>Our policy requires a 90-day waiting period before reconsidering candidates for the same role. This allows us to ensure a fair and thorough evaluation of all applicants.</em></p> <p><strong>About Us:</strong></p> <p><em>At Scale, our mission is to develop reliable AI systems for the world's most important decisions. graduate degree preferred</li> <li>Experience with SQL, Python, or Mode Notepad scripting</li> <li>Consulting or supply chain/operations experience</li> <li>Prior experience mentoring or managing a team or have lead a project</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p><div class="content-conclusion"><p><strong><em>PLEASE NOTE:&nbsp;</em></strong><em>Our policy requires a 90-day waiting period before reconsidering candidates for the same role. This allows us to ensure a fair and thorough evaluation of all applicants.</em></p> <p><strong>About Us:</strong></p> <p><em>At Scale, our mission is to develop reliable AI systems for the world's most important decisions. Our products provide the high-quality data and full-stack technologies that power the world's leading models, and help enterprises and governments build, deploy, and oversee AI applications that deliver real impact. We work closely with industry leaders like Meta, Cisco, DLA Piper, Mayo Clinic, Time Inc., the Government of Qatar, and U.S. government agencies including the Army and Air Force. We are expanding our team to accelerate the development of AI applications.</em></p> <p><em>We believe that everyone should be able to bring their whole selves to work, which is why we are proud to be an inclusive and equal opportunity workplace. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability status, gender identity or Veteran status.&nbsp;</em></p> <p><em>We are committed to working with and providing reasonable accommodations to applicants with physical and mental disabilities. If you need assistance and/or a reasonable accommodation in the application or recruiting process due to a disability, please contact us at accommodations@scale.com. Please see the United States Department of Labor's </em><a href="https://www.eeoc.gov/sites/default/files/2023-06/22-088_EEOC_KnowYourRights6.12ScreenRdr.pdf"><em>Know Your Rights poster</em></a><em> for additional information.</em></p> <p><em>We comply with the United States Department of Labor's </em><a href="https://www.dol.gov/sites/dolgov/files/ofccp/pdf/pay-transp_English_unformattedESQA508c.pdf"><em>Pay Transparency provision</em></a><em>.&nbsp;</em></p> <p><em><strong>PLEASE NOTE: </strong>We collect, retain and use personal data for our professional business purposes, including notifying you of job opportunities that may be of interest and sharing with our affiliates. We limit the personal data we collect to that which we believe is appropriate and necessary to manage applicants’ needs, provide our services, and comply with applicable laws. Any information we collect in connection with your application will be treated in accordance with our internal policies and programs designed to protect personal data. Please see our <a href="https://scale.com/legal/privacy" target="_blank">privacy policy</a> for additional information.</em></p></div>

raw_text: Job Title: Field Engineer, Public Sector. Description: <p>Scale is a vital part of bringing AI-enabled technologies to the world, from autonomous driving to drones, robots, and large language models. For example, Scale works with the world's top self-driving car and robotics ML teams as well as the largest companies in the generative AI space.&nbsp;</p> <p>As our customer base is growing, you will be on the front lines of our field engineering efforts for our federal AI projects, having the opportunity to meaningfully impact millions of dollars in revenue by working closely with our largest public sector customers and ensuring that they become passionate, lifelong Scale customers.</p> <p>Our Field Engineers ensure customers' experiences with Scale's technology are seamless and optimized to build a successful, long-term partnership. Field Engineers partner closely with Product, Engineering, and Operations to lead existing customers through building production-grade data pipelines. We do this by knowing our customer’s use-cases inside and out, and creating the tooling and documentation needed to scalably support their growth.</p> <p>Field Engineers in general are experts on Scale's products and codebase, and have general technical knowledge on web development, using APIs, and working with large volumes of data. Field Engineers are strong relationship builders, great project managers, and always fun to work with.&nbsp;</p> <p>The ideal person is a software engineer generalist who enjoys working with clients directly, taking ambiguous requirements and issues, and quickly designing and building sustainable solutions in close collaboration with the Product and Engineering teams. This role is at the intersection of customer delivery, product, and engineering, giving you a breadth of experience and fully leveraging both sides of your brain. If this sounds like you, we invite you to apply!</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>You will:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Implement end-to-end data integrations, syncing customer’s data to Scale’s platform and back</li> <li>Work closely with our customer’s engineering teams to optimize data pipelines, including providing input towards designing API endpoints and input/output schemas</li> <li>Design, develop and maintain playbooks, internal tools, Scale’s documentation and SDKs to quickly get customers set up for long-term success</li> <li>Partner with Software Engineers and Operations to remove any technical hurdles customers may face / Debug technical issues impacting delivery and own technical escalations coming from the customer</li> <li>Be accountable for the customer’s technical experience throughout their time with Scale</li> <li>Work with AEs and PMs to identify customer-specific feature requests</li> <li>Develop technical domain expertise in areas of Large Language Models, 2D Image Annotation, and working with API integrations</li> <li>Evangelize Scale and interact with customers at major events</li> <li style="font-weight: bold;"><span style="text-decoration: underline;"><strong>Have an active TS/SCI clearance</strong></span></li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>Ideally you'd have:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Track record of success as a hybrid customer-facing engineer or similar function, wearing multiple hats along the way</li> <li>Prior technical hands-on experience working with clients in a pre or post-sales capacity to realize business goals</li> <li>Prior experience developing with Python and JavaScript, or other modern software languages</li> <li>Strong engineering background preferably in Computer Science, Mathematics, or other quantitative fields</li> <li>Strong project management and interpersonal skills</li> <li>Presentation skills with a high degree of technical credibility when speaking with executives and front-line engineers</li> <li>High level of comfort communicating effectively across internal and external organizations</li> <li>Intellectual curiosity, empathy, and ability to operate with high velocity</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>Nice to haves:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Experience in AI</li> <li>Experience working in classified environments</li> <li>Previous experience as a technical go-to-market resource</li> <li>Understanding of DevSecOps principles, including secure software delivery, infrastructure as code, and continuous integration/deployment</li> <li>Hands-on knowledge of container orchestration with Kubernetes and experience with Helm charts for application deployment</li> <li>Experience automating infrastructure and configuration management using Ansible or similar tools</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p><em>Compensation packages at Scale for eligible roles include base salary, equity, and benefits. The range displayed on each job posting reflects the minimum and maximum target for new hire salaries for the position, determined by work location and additional factors, including job-related skills, experience, interview performance, and relevant education or training. Scale employees in eligible roles are also granted equity based compensation, subject to Board of Director approval. Your recruiter can share more about the specific salary range for your preferred location during the hiring process, and confirm whether the hired role will be eligible for equity grant. You’ll also receive benefits including, but not limited to: Comprehensive health, dental and vision coverage, retirement benefits, a learning and development stipend, and generous PTO. Additionally, this role may be eligible for additional benefits such as a commuter stipend.</em></p></div><div class="title">Please reference the job posting's subtitle for where this position will be located. For pay transparency purposes, the base salary range for this full-time position in the locations of San Francisco, New York, Seattle is:</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$190,000</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$290,000 USD</span></div></div><div class="pay-input"><div class="title">The base salary range for this full-time position in the locations of Hawaii, Washington DC, Texas, Colorado is:</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$170,000</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$260,000 USD</span></div></div><div class="pay-input"><div class="title">The base salary range for this full-time position in the location of St. Louis is:</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$140,000</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$220,000 USD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><p><strong><em>PLEASE NOTE:&nbsp;</em></strong><em>Our policy requires a 90-day waiting period before reconsidering candidates for the same role. This allows us to ensure a fair and thorough evaluation of all applicants.</em></p> <p><strong>About Us:</strong></p> <p><em>At Scale, our mission is to develop reliable AI systems for the world's most important decisions. Our products provide the high-quality data and full-stack technologies that power the world's leading models, and help enterprises and governments build, deploy, and oversee AI applications that deliver real impact. We work closely with industry leaders like Meta, Cisco, DLA Piper, Mayo Clinic, Time Inc., the Government of Qatar, and U.S. government agencies including the Army and Air Force. We are expanding our team to accelerate the development of AI applications.</em></p> <p><em>We believe that everyone should be able to bring their whole selves to work, which is why we are proud to be an inclusive and equal opportunity workplace. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability status, gender identity or Veteran status.&nbsp;</em></p> <p><em>We are committed to working with and providing reasonable accommodations to applicants with physical and mental disabilities. If you need assistance and/or a reasonable accommodation in the application or recruiting process due to a disability, please contact us at accommodations@scale.com. Please see the United States Department of Labor's </em><a href="https://www.eeoc.gov/sites/default/files/2023-06/22-088_EEOC_KnowYourRights6.12ScreenRdr.pdf"><em>Know Your Rights poster</em></a><em> for additional information.</em></p> <p><em>We comply with the United States Department of Labor's </em><a href="https://www.dol.gov/sites/dolgov/files/ofccp/pdf/pay-transp_English_unformattedESQA508c.pdf"><em>Pay Transparency provision</em></a><em>.&nbsp;</em></p> <p><em><strong>PLEASE NOTE: </strong>We collect, retain and use personal data for our professional business purposes, including notifying you of job opportunities that may be of interest and sharing with our affiliates. We limit the personal data we collect to that which we believe is appropriate and necessary to manage applicants’ needs, provide our services, and comply with applicable laws. Any information we collect in connection with your application will be treated in accordance with our internal policies and programs designed to protect personal data. Please see our <a href="https://scale.com/legal/privacy" target="_blank">privacy policy</a> for additional information.</em></p></div>

raw_text: Job Title: Finance Fellow - Human Frontier Collective (UK). Description: <p data-start="78" data-end="300"><strong>PLEASE NOTE: </strong>This is a fully remote, 1099 independent contractor opportunity with an estimated duration of six months and the potential for extension. To be eligible, candidates must be authorized to work in the country they reside in.</p> <h3><strong>About the Program</strong></h3> <p>The<strong> Human Frontier Collective (HFC) Fellowship</strong> brings together top researchers and domain experts to collaborate on high-impact work that are shaping the future of AI. As an HFC Fellow, you’ll apply your academic and professional expertise to help design, evaluate, and interpret advanced generative AI systems—while gaining exposure to cutting-edge research and working alongside an interdisciplinary network of leading thinkers.</p> <h3><strong>What You'll Do</strong></h3> <ul> <li><strong>Collaborative Work: </strong>Get invited to engage in high-impact projects with our partnered AI labs and platforms. Develop and evaluate complex financial scenarios to test and enhance AI accuracy in valuation, forecasting, and analysis; collaborate in interactive sessions to assess model outputs for market relevance and compliance; provide detailed feedback to improve AI capabilities; and contribute to specialized projects in financial modeling, risk assessment, and equity research.</li> <li><strong>HFC Community:</strong> Beyond the work, you’ll become part of a supportive, interdisciplinary network of innovators and thought leaders committed to advancing frontier AI across domains.</li> <li><strong>Contribute to Research Publications:</strong> Collaborate with Scale’s research team to co-author technical reports and research papers—boosting your academic visibility and professional recognition&nbsp;(e.g., <a href="https://scale.com/research/scipredict"><em>SciPredict</em></a>, <a href="https://scale.com/research/propensitybench"><em>PropensityBench</em></a>, <a href="https://scale.com/research/prbench"><em>Professional Reasoning Benchmark</em></a>).</li> </ul> <h3><strong>Who Should Apply</strong></h3> <ul> <li><strong>Education:</strong> PhD, Master, BBA in Finance, Economics, or related degrees.</li> <li><strong>Certifications:</strong> CFA or CPA strongly preferred.</li> <li><strong>Professional Background: </strong>5+ years in FP&amp;A, Investment Banking, Portfolio Management, Financial Consulting, or equivalent research experience.</li> <li><strong>Skills:</strong> Strong proficiency in financial modeling, valuation methodologies, forecasting, asset pricing, DCF analysis, market analysis, and risk assessment.&nbsp;</li> <li><strong>Professional Mindset:</strong> Detail-oriented, innovative thinker with a passion for financial technology and a commitment to collaboration. Prior experience with AI is not required, but a plus.</li> </ul> <h3><strong>Why Join the HFC?</strong></h3> <ul> <li><strong>Advance Finance AI Solutions: </strong>Apply your financial expertise to solve complex, real-world challenges where your judgment shapes advanced AI reasoning and decision-making.</li> <li><strong>Professional Development: </strong>High-impact finance experts expand their influence through review projects, advisory roles, and research—while deepening their AI expertise, sharpening analytical and financial skills, and gaining hands-on experience with cutting-edge AI applications.</li> <li><strong>Join a Top-Tier Network: </strong>Collaborate with a global network of academics and experts to advance responsible AI through impactful, flexible research and training. 80% of our members come from leading institutions.</li> <li><strong>Flexible Schedule: </strong>Set your own schedule, with flexible 10–40 hour weeks that fit around your life and other commitments.</li> <li><strong>Competitive Pay:</strong> Project pay rates vary across platforms and are depending on a number of factors, including but not limited to; projects, scope, skillset, and location.&nbsp;</li> </ul> <h3><strong>Application Process</strong></h3> <ol> <li><strong>Apply: </strong>We review applications on a rolling basis.</li> <li><strong>Complete a Challenge: </strong>Selected candidates will undertake a brief task designed to reflect HFC work and evaluate their domain expertise.</li> <li><strong>Interview:</strong> Candidates will get to discuss their research experience, professional background, and alignment with our mission to advance human-centered AI.</li> <li><strong>Join the Collective:</strong> Successful candidates will receive an invitation to join the Human Frontier Collective Fellowship.</li> </ol><div class="content-conclusion"><p><strong><em>PLEASE NOTE:&nbsp;</em></strong><em>Our policy requires a 90-day waiting period before reconsidering candidates for the same role. This allows us to ensure a fair and thorough evaluation of all applicants.</em></p> <p><strong>About Us:</strong></p> <p><em>At Scale, our mission is to develop reliable AI systems for the world's most important decisions. Our products provide the high-quality data and full-stack technologies that power the world's leading models, and help enterprises and governments build, deploy, and oversee AI applications that deliver real impact. We work closely with industry leaders like Meta, Cisco, DLA Piper, Mayo Clinic, Time Inc., the Government of Qatar, and U.S. government agencies including the Army and Air Force. We are expanding our team to accelerate the development of AI applications.</em></p> <p><em>We believe that everyone should be able to bring their whole selves to work, which is why we are proud to be an inclusive and equal opportunity workplace. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability status, gender identity or Veteran status.&nbsp;</em></p> <p><em>We are committed to working with and providing reasonable accommodations to applicants with physical and mental disabilities. If you need assistance and/or a reasonable accommodation in the application or recruiting process due to a disability, please contact us at accommodations@scale.com. Please see the United States Department of Labor's </em><a href="https://www.eeoc.gov/sites/default/files/2023-06/22-088_EEOC_KnowYourRights6.12ScreenRdr.pdf"><em>Know Your Rights poster</em></a><em> for additional information.</em></p> <p><em>We comply with the United States Department of Labor's </em><a href="https://www.dol.gov/sites/dolgov/files/ofccp/pdf/pay-transp_English_unformattedESQA508c.pdf"><em>Pay Transparency provision</em></a><em>.&nbsp;</em></p> <p><em><strong>PLEASE NOTE: </strong>We collect, retain and use personal data for our professional business purposes, including notifying you of job opportunities that may be of interest and sharing with our affiliates. We limit the personal data we collect to that which we believe is appropriate and necessary to manage applicants’ needs, provide our services, and comply with applicable laws. Any information we collect in connection with your application will be treated in accordance with our internal policies and programs designed to protect personal data. Please see our <a href="https://scale.com/legal/privacy" target="_blank">privacy policy</a> for additional information.</em></p></div>

raw_text: Job Title: Forward Deployed AI Engineering Manager, Enterprise . Description: <h2><strong>About Scale AI</strong></h2> <p>Scale AI is the data foundation for AI, helping organizations build and deploy reliable production AI applications. We partner with leading enterprises and government organizations to accelerate their AI initiatives through our data annotation platform, generative AI solutions, and enterprise AI capabilities.</p> <h2><strong>Role Overview</strong></h2> <p>As a Forward Deployed AI Engineering Manager on our Enterprise team, you'll be the technical bridge between Scale AI's cutting-edge AI capabilities and our most strategic customers. You'll work with enterprise clients to understand their unique challenges, lead a team that architects specific AI solutions, and ensure successful deployment and adoption of AI systems in production environments.</p> <p>This is a Management role that combines deep engineering and AI expertise, leading a team, and working on customer-facing problems. You'll work directly with customer engineering teams to integrate AI into their critical workflows.</p> <h2><strong>Key Responsibilities</strong></h2> <h3><strong>Customer Integration &amp; Deployment</strong></h3> <ul> <li>Partner directly with enterprise customers to understand their technical infrastructure, data pipelines, and business requirements</li> <li>Design and implement custom integrations between Scale AI's platform and customer data environments (cloud platforms, data warehouses, internal APIs)</li> <li>Build robust data connectors and ETL pipelines to ingest, process, and prepare customer data for AI workflows</li> <li>Deploy and configure AI models and agents within customer security and compliance boundaries</li> </ul> <h3><strong>AI Agent Development</strong></h3> <ul> <li>Develop production-grade AI agents tailored to customer use cases across domains like customer support, data analysis, content generation, and workflow automation</li> <li>Architect multi-agent systems that orchestrate between different models, tools, and data sources</li> <li>Implement evaluation frameworks to measure agent performance and iterate toward business objectives</li> <li>Design human-in-the-loop workflows and feedback mechanisms for continuous agent improvement</li> </ul> <h3><strong>Prompt Engineering &amp; Optimization</strong></h3> <ul> <li>Create sophisticated prompt engineering strategies optimized for customer-specific domains and data</li> <li>Build and maintain prompt libraries, templates, and best practices for customer use cases</li> <li>Conduct systematic prompt experimentation and A/B testing to improve model outputs</li> <li>Implement RAG (Retrieval Augmented Generation) systems and fine-tuning pipelines where appropriate</li> </ul> <h3><strong>Leadership &amp; Collaboration</strong></h3> <ul> <li>Serve as the Engineering Manager and technical point of contact for strategic enterprise accounts</li> <li>Lead a team that is collaborating with customer data scientists, ML engineers, and software developers to ensure smooth integration</li> <li>Work closely with Scale's product and engineering teams to translate customer needs into product improvements</li> <li>Document technical architectures, integration patterns, and best practices</li> </ul> <h3><strong>Problem Solving &amp; Innovation</strong></h3> <ul> <li>Debug complex technical issues across the entire stack, from data pipelines to model outputs</li> <li>Rapidly prototype solutions to unblock customers and prove out new use cases</li> <li>Stay current on the latest AI/ML research and tools, bringing innovative approaches to customer problems</li> <li>Identify opportunities for productization based on common customer patterns</li> </ul> <h2><strong>Required Qualifications</strong></h2> <ul> <li><strong>5+ years of software engineering experience with 2+ yrs of </strong>&nbsp;<strong>Management experience </strong>with strong fundamentals in data structures, algorithms, and system design</li> <li><strong>Production Python expertise</strong> with experience in modern ML/AI frameworks (e.g., LangChain, LlamaIndex, HuggingFace, OpenAI API)</li> <li><strong>Experience with cloud platforms</strong> (AWS, GCP, or Azure) and modern data infrastructure</li> <li><strong>Strong problem-solving skills</strong> with the ability to navigate ambiguous requirements and rapidly iterate toward solutions</li> <li><strong>Excellent communication skills</strong> with the ability to explain complex technical concepts to both technical and non-technical audiences</li> </ul> <h2><strong>Preferred Qualifications</strong></h2> <p><em>Agent Development Wiz</em></p> <ul> <li>Deep understanding of LLMs including prompting techniques, embeddings, and RAG architectures</li> <li>Experience building and deploying AI agents or autonomous systems in production</li> <li>Knowledge of vector databases and semantic search systems</li> <li>Contributions to open-source AI/ML projects</li> </ul> <p><em>Infrastructure Guru</em></p> <ul> <li>Experience with containerization (Docker, Kubernetes) and CI/CD pipelines</li> <li>Experience using Terraform, Bicep, or other Infrastructure as Code (IaC) tools</li> <li>Previous work in a devops, platform, or infra role</li> <li>Familiarity with enterprise security, compliance, and governance requirements (SOC 2, GDPR, HIPAA)</li> </ul> <p><em>Customer Product Whisperer</em></p> <ul> <li>Proven ability to work with customers in a technical consulting, solutions engineering, or product engineering role</li> <li>Domain expertise in verticals like finance, healthcare, government, or manufacturing</li> <li>Experience with technical enablement or teaching programs</li> </ul> <h2><strong>Sample Projects</strong></h2> <p>The following are some examples of the types of projects we’ve worked on with customers. All of these projects leverage customer data, integrate directly into customers’ existing systems, and are deployed on their infrastructure.</p> <h3><strong>Deep Research for Due Diligence</strong></h3> <p>For a global professional services firm, we developed a sophisticated deep research agent to assist in due diligence. This agent employs a multi-agent architecture for robust fact-checking, integrates several internal MCP tools, and processes complex, unstructured data sources. This solution reliably saves employees hundreds of hours weekly.</p> <h3><strong>Churn Prediction</strong></h3> <p>Working with a TelCo organization, we built a model utilizing customer data to predict churn likelihood. The system then curates personalized offers based on this prediction. This model was integrated into a "next best action" copilot, enabling call center agents to proactively surface relevant offers to customers, leading to a significant reduction in churn.</p> <h3><strong>Data Extraction Voice Agent</strong></h3> <p>We partnered with a healthcare organization to create a lifelike voice agent and avatar designed to gather unstructured health information from patients. Engineered for low latency, the agent adeptly manages conversational flow, adheres to safety guardrails, and efficiently handles data extraction. This automation saves the organization's nurses hundreds of hours each week.</p><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p><em>Compensation packages at Scale for eligible roles include base salary, equity, and benefits. The range displayed on each job posting reflects the minimum and maximum target for new hire salaries for the position, determined by work location and additional factors, including job-related skills, experience, interview performance, and relevant education or training. Scale employees in eligible roles are also granted equity based compensation, subject to Board of Director approval. Your recruiter can share more about the specific salary range for your preferred location during the hiring process, and confirm whether the hired role will be eligible for equity grant. You’ll also receive benefits including, but not limited to: Comprehensive health, dental and vision coverage, retirement benefits, a learning and development stipend, and generous PTO. Additionally, this role may be eligible for additional benefits such as a commuter stipend.</em></p></div><div class="title">Please reference the job posting's subtitle for where this position will be located. For pay transparency purposes, the base salary range for this full-time position in the locations of San Francisco, New York, Seattle is:</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$216,000</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$270,000 USD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><p><strong><em>PLEASE NOTE:&nbsp;</em></strong><em>Our policy requires a 90-day waiting period before reconsidering candidates for the same role. This allows us to ensure a fair and thorough evaluation of all applicants.</em></p> <p><strong>About Us:</strong></p> <p><em>At Scale, our mission is to develop reliable AI systems for the world's most important decisions. Our products provide the high-quality data and full-stack technologies that power the world's leading models, and help enterprises and governments build, deploy, and oversee AI applications that deliver real impact. We work closely with industry leaders like Meta, Cisco, DLA Piper, Mayo Clinic, Time Inc., the Government of Qatar, and U.S. government agencies including the Army and Air Force. We are expanding our team to accelerate the development of AI applications.</em></p> <p><em>We believe that everyone should be able to bring their whole selves to work, which is why we are proud to be an inclusive and equal opportunity workplace. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability status, gender identity or Veteran status.&nbsp;</em></p> <p><em>We are committed to working with and providing reasonable accommodations to applicants with physical and mental disabilities. If you need assistance and/or a reasonable accommodation in the application or recruiting process due to a disability, please contact us at accommodations@scale.com. Please see the United States Department of Labor's </em><a href="https://www.eeoc.gov/sites/default/files/2023-06/22-088_EEOC_KnowYourRights6.12ScreenRdr.pdf"><em>Know Your Rights poster</em></a><em> for additional information.</em></p> <p><em>We comply with the United States Department of Labor's </em><a href="https://www.dol.gov/sites/dolgov/files/ofccp/pdf/pay-transp_English_unformattedESQA508c.pdf"><em>Pay Transparency provision</em></a><em>.&nbsp;</em></p> <p><em><strong>PLEASE NOTE: </strong>We collect, retain and use personal data for our professional business purposes, including notifying you of job opportunities that may be of interest and sharing with our affiliates. We limit the personal data we collect to that which we believe is appropriate and necessary to manage applicants’ needs, provide our services, and comply with applicable laws. Any information we collect in connection with your application will be treated in accordance with our internal policies and programs designed to protect personal data. Please see our <a href="https://scale.com/legal/privacy" target="_blank">privacy policy</a> for additional information.</em></p></div>
