raw_text: Job Title: Operations & Strategy Manager, Public Sector. Description: <p>Scale's Public Sector business is growing based on demand from government customers for AI / ML products like computer vision and agentic generative AI applications. As an Operations &amp; Strategy Manager on the Public Sector Business Operations (BizOps) team you will be on the front lines of enabling and accelerating this growth.&nbsp;</p> <p>We are looking for a hard-charging generalist who combines analytical rigor and an obsessive focus on outcomes with an empathetic interpersonal style. If you enjoy solving hard problems while building strong teams &amp; relationships, we'd love to hear from you!</p> <p><strong>You will:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Report directly to the Head of Business Operations (BizOps), Public Sector&nbsp;</li> <li>Leverage the full complement of your business toolkit to drive results (business analytics, strategic thinking, operational execution, project/program management, problem framing, executive communication, etc.)&nbsp;&nbsp;</li> <li>Tackle ambiguous, open-ended questions in support of high-priority outcomes, often with a broad set of stakeholders (engineering, analytics, product managers, geospatial experts, delivery, etc.)</li> <li>Help mature key business processes while innovating 0→1 on new systems; Quickly develop and iterate on solutions, eventually handing them off to the appropriate team member</li> <li>Craft strategies that propel public sector operations growth and organizational evolution</li> <li>Identify cross-project blind spots across our customer programs and uplevel our operational approaches</li> </ul> <p><strong>Ideally you’d have:</strong></p> <ul> <li>5+ years of experience in an operations, strategy, or consulting role requiring a blend of operational, strategic, and cross-functional work&nbsp;</li> <li>Experience in product, project, or program management — you can take projects from conceptual problem definition to implemented solution</li> <li>A penchant for digging deep into data, thinking from first principles, and iterating quickly to deliver results</li> <li>A strong orientation towards outcomes and a history of being scrappy when it counts</li> <li>An easygoing interpersonal style and ability to work and build relationships with a wide range of people&nbsp;</li> <li>Experience leading small teams and managing multiple, complex work streams&nbsp;</li> <li>A deep intellectual curiosity about AI and machine learning, particularly in applications that advance national security</li> </ul> <p><strong>Nice to haves:</strong></p> <ul> <li>MBA or relevant technical degree</li> <li>Experience using Python, SQL, or similar analytical tools to translate insights into actionable outcomes</li> <li>Background in intelligence work and working with / within the U.S. government</li> <li>Previous private sector experience in computer vision, GenAI applications / agents, or similar technologies</li> <li>Active U.S. security clearance (Secret or Top Secret)</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p><em>Compensation packages at Scale for eligible roles include base salary, equity, and benefits. The range displayed on each job posting reflects the minimum and maximum target for new hire salaries for the position, determined by work location and additional factors, including job-related skills, experience, interview performance, and relevant education or training. Scale employees in eligible roles are also granted equity based compensation, subject to Board of Director approval. Your recruiter can share more about the specific salary range for your preferred location during the hiring process, and confirm whether the hired role will be eligible for equity grant. You’ll also receive benefits including, but not limited to: Comprehensive health, dental and vision coverage, retirement benefits, a learning and development stipend, and generous PTO. Additionally, this role may be eligible for additional benefits such as a commuter stipend.</em></p></div><div class="title">Please reference the job posting's subtitle for where this position will be located. For pay transparency purposes, the base salary range for this full-time position in the locations of San Francisco, New York, Seattle is:</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$145,200</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$220,000 USD</span></div></div><div class="pay-input"><div class="title">Please reference the job posting's subtitle for where this position will be located. For pay transparency purposes, the base salary range for this full-time position in the locations of Washington DC, Texas, Colorado, Hawaii is:</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$130,900</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$217,800 USD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><p><strong><em>PLEASE NOTE:&nbsp;</em></strong><em>Our policy requires a 90-day waiting period before reconsidering candidates for the same role. This allows us to ensure a fair and thorough evaluation of all applicants.</em></p> <p><strong>About Us:</strong></p> <p><em>At Scale, our mission is to develop reliable AI systems for the world's most important decisions. Our products provide the high-quality data and full-stack technologies that power the world's leading models, and help enterprises and governments build, deploy, and oversee AI applications that deliver real impact. We work closely with industry leaders like Meta, Cisco, DLA Piper, Mayo Clinic, Time Inc., the Government of Qatar, and U.S. government agencies including the Army and Air Force. We are expanding our team to accelerate the development of AI applications.</em></p> <p><em>We believe that everyone should be able to bring their whole selves to work, which is why we are proud to be an inclusive and equal opportunity workplace. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability status, gender identity or Veteran status.&nbsp;</em></p> <p><em>We are committed to working with and providing reasonable accommodations to applicants with physical and mental disabilities. If you need assistance and/or a reasonable accommodation in the application or recruiting process due to a disability, please contact us at accommodations@scale.com. Please see the United States Department of Labor's </em><a href="https://www.eeoc.gov/sites/default/files/2023-06/22-088_EEOC_KnowYourRights6.12ScreenRdr.pdf"><em>Know Your Rights poster</em></a><em> for additional information.</em></p> <p><em>We comply with the United States Department of Labor's </em><a href="https://www.dol.gov/sites/dolgov/files/ofccp/pdf/pay-transp_English_unformattedESQA508c.pdf"><em>Pay Transparency provision</em></a><em>.&nbsp;</em></p> <p><em><strong>PLEASE NOTE: </strong>We collect, retain and use personal data for our professional business purposes, including notifying you of job opportunities that may be of interest and sharing with our affiliates. raw_text: Job Title: Partnerships Lead, Public Sector. Description: <p>Scale is at the forefront of the AI revolution, and our Public Sector business is expanding rapidly. To accelerate this growth, we are seeking a <strong>Partnership Lead</strong> to design, build, and lead our Public Sector partner ecosystem. This role is a unique opportunity to architect a world-class partnership program from the ground up, creating the strategic alliances that will define how the government adopts AI at scale.</p> <p>Reporting to the <strong>Head of Public Sector GTM</strong>, you will lead a team of <strong>Partner Development Managers (PDMs)</strong> to execute joint Go-To-Market (GTM) strategies. You are building a pipeline engine that leverages Global Systems Integrators (GSIs), Defense Primes, and technology partners to drive mission-critical outcomes for our government customers.</p> <h3><strong>You will:</strong></h3> <ul> <li><strong>Architect the Partner Program:</strong> Design the overarching strategy, tiering, and incentive structures for Scale’s Public Sector partner ecosystem.</li> <li><strong>Lead and Scale a Team:</strong> Recruit, mentor, and manage a high-performing team of Partner Development Managers, setting clear KPIs for pipeline generation and partner enablement.</li> <li><strong>Drive Joint GTM Execution:</strong> Partner with the sales and marketing teams to execute co-selling motions and joint marketing campaigns that generate high-quality, qualified pipeline.</li> <li><strong>Build Strategic Alliances:</strong> Identify and cultivate deep relationships with executive leadership at key partner organizations, ensuring Scale is their "first-call" AI partner.</li> <li><strong>Operationalize the Channel:</strong> Work closely with GTM Operations to build the infrastructure for deal registration, partner attribution, and performance tracking.</li> <li><strong>Align with Product &amp; Delivery:</strong> Ensure our partners are technically enabled and supported by our Product and Engineering teams to deliver high-quality solutions to government end-users.</li> <li><strong>Represent Scale:</strong> Act as the face of Scale’s partner organization at major industry events, briefings, and executive summits.</li> </ul> <h3><strong>We’re looking for:</strong></h3> <ul> <li><strong>10+ years of professional experience,</strong> with at least 5 years in a leadership role within Public Sector partnerships, channel sales, or business development.</li> <li><strong>Proven Program Builder:</strong> A track record of building a partner program from scratch or significantly scaling an existing one within a high-growth technology environment.</li> <li><strong>Public Sector Expertise:</strong> Deep understanding of the government contracting landscape, including FAR/DFARS, contract vehicles, and the role of SIs in the federal procurement process.</li> <li><strong>Pipeline Focused:</strong> A "hunter" mentality toward pipeline generation, with a demonstrated ability to source and influence revenue through third-party ecosystems.</li> <li><strong>Exceptional Leadership:</strong> Experience managing and developing individual contributors, with a focus on coaching and driving high performance.</li> <li><strong>Strategic &amp; Analytical:</strong> The ability to move between high-level ecosystem strategy and the granular data needed to track partner health and ROI.</li> <li><strong>Technical Literacy:</strong> Familiarity with the AI/ML landscape and the ability to articulate Scale’s value proposition to both technical and business-focused partners.</li> </ul><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p><em>Compensation packages at Scale for eligible roles include base salary, equity, and benefits. The range displayed on each job posting reflects the minimum and maximum target for new hire salaries for the position, determined by work location and additional factors, including job-related skills, experience, interview performance, and relevant education or training. Scale employees in eligible roles are also granted equity based compensation, subject to Board of Director approval. Your recruiter can share more about the specific salary range for your preferred location during the hiring process, and confirm whether the hired role will be eligible for equity grant. You’ll also receive benefits including, but not limited to: Comprehensive health, dental and vision coverage, retirement benefits, a learning and development stipend, and generous PTO. Additionally, this role may be eligible for additional benefits such as a commuter stipend.</em></p></div><div class="title">The base salary range for this full-time position in the location of Washington DC is:</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$169,533</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$203,440 USD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><p><strong><em>PLEASE NOTE:&nbsp;</em></strong><em>Our policy requires a 90-day waiting period before reconsidering candidates for the same role. This allows us to ensure a fair and thorough evaluation of all applicants.</em></p> <p><strong>About Us:</strong></p> <p><em>At Scale, our mission is to develop reliable AI systems for the world's most important decisions. Our products provide the high-quality data and full-stack technologies that power the world's leading models, and help enterprises and governments build, deploy, and oversee AI applications that deliver real impact. We work closely with industry leaders like Meta, Cisco, DLA Piper, Mayo Clinic, Time Inc., the Government of Qatar, and U.S. government agencies including the Army and Air Force. We are expanding our team to accelerate the development of AI applications.</em></p> <p><em>We believe that everyone should be able to bring their whole selves to work, which is why we are proud to be an inclusive and equal opportunity workplace. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability status, gender identity or Veteran status.&nbsp;</em></p> <p><em>We are committed to working with and providing reasonable accommodations to applicants with physical and mental disabilities. If you need assistance and/or a reasonable accommodation in the application or recruiting process due to a disability, please contact us at accommodations@scale.com. cleaned_text: Job Title: Partnerships Lead, Public Sector. Description: <p>Scale is at the forefront of the AI revolution, and our Public Sector business is expanding rapidly. To accelerate this growth, we are seeking a <strong>Partnership Lead</strong> to design, build, and lead our Public Sector partner ecosystem. This role is a unique opportunity to architect a world-class partnership program from the ground up, creating the strategic alliances that will define how the government adopts AI at scale.</p> <p>Reporting to the <strong>Head of Public Sector GTM</strong>, you will lead a team of <strong>Partner Development Managers (PDMs)</strong> to execute joint Go-To-Market (GTM) strategies. You are building a pipeline engine that leverages Global Systems Integrators (GSIs), Defense Primes, and technology partners to drive mission-critical outcomes for our government customers.</p> <h3><strong>You will:</strong></h3> <ul> <li><strong>Architect the Partner Program:</strong> Design the overarching strategy, tiering, and incentive structures for Scale’s Public Sector partner ecosystem.</li> <li><strong>Lead and Scale a Team:</strong> Recruit, mentor, and manage a high-performing team of Partner Development Managers, setting clear KPIs for pipeline generation and partner enablement.</li> <li><strong>Drive Joint GTM Execution:</strong> Partner with the sales and marketing teams to execute co-selling motions and joint marketing campaigns that generate high-quality, qualified pipeline.</li> <li><strong>Build Strategic Alliances:</strong> Identify and cultivate deep relationships with executive leadership at key partner organizations, ensuring Scale is their "first-call" AI partner.</li> <li><strong>Operationalize the Channel:</strong> Work closely with GTM Operations to build the infrastructure for deal registration, partner attribution, and performance tracking.</li> <li><strong>Align with Product &amp; Delivery:</strong> Ensure our partners are technically enabled and supported by our Product and Engineering teams to deliver high-quality solutions to government end-users.</li> <li><strong>Represent Scale:</strong> Act as the face of Scale’s partner organization at major industry events, briefings, and executive summits.</li> </ul> <h3><strong>We’re looking for:</strong></h3> <ul> <li><strong>10+ years of professional experience,</strong> with at least 5 years in a leadership role within Public Sector partnerships, channel sales, or business development.</li> <li><strong>Proven Program Builder:</strong> A track record of building a partner program from scratch or significantly scaling an existing one within a high-growth technology environment.</li> <li><strong>Public Sector Expertise:</strong> Deep understanding of the government contracting landscape, including FAR/DFARS, contract vehicles, and the role of SIs in the federal procurement process.</li> <li><strong>Pipeline Focused:</strong> A "hunter" mentality toward pipeline generation, with a demonstrated ability to source and influence revenue through third-party ecosystems.</li> <li><strong>Exceptional Leadership:</strong> Experience managing and developing individual contributors, with a focus on coaching and driving high performance.</li> <li><strong>Strategic &amp; Analytical:</strong> The ability to move between high-level ecosystem strategy and the granular data needed to track partner health and ROI.</li> <li><strong>Technical Literacy:</strong> Familiarity with the AI/ML landscape and the ability to articulate Scale’s value proposition to both technical and business-focused partners.</li> </ul><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p><em>Compensation packages at Scale for eligible roles include base salary, equity, and benefits. The range displayed on each job posting reflects the minimum and maximum target for new hire salaries for the position, determined by work location and additional factors, including job-related skills, experience, interview performance, and relevant education or training. Scale employees in eligible roles are also granted equity based compensation, subject to Board of Director approval. Your recruiter can share more about the specific salary range for your preferred location during the hiring process, and confirm whether the hired role will be eligible for equity grant. You’ll also receive benefits including, but not limited to: Comprehensive health, dental and vision coverage, retirement benefits, a learning and development stipend, and generous PTO. Additionally, this role may be eligible for additional benefits such as a commuter stipend.</em></p></div><div class="title">The base salary range for this full-time position in the location of Washington DC is:</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$169,533</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$203,440 USD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><p><strong><em>PLEASE NOTE:&nbsp;</em></strong><em>Our policy requires a 90-day waiting period before reconsidering candidates for the same role. This allows us to ensure a fair and thorough evaluation of all applicants.</em></p> <p><strong>About Us:</strong></p> <p><em>At Scale, our mission is to develop reliable AI systems for the world's most important decisions. Our products provide the high-quality data and full-stack technologies that power the world's leading models, and help enterprises and governments build, deploy, and oversee AI applications that deliver real impact. We work closely with industry leaders like Meta, Cisco, DLA Piper, Mayo Clinic, Time Inc., the Government of Qatar, and U.S. government agencies including the Army and Air Force. We are expanding our team to accelerate the development of AI applications.</em></p> <p><em>We believe that everyone should be able to bring their whole selves to work, which is why we are proud to be an inclusive and equal opportunity workplace. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability status, gender identity or Veteran status.&nbsp;</em></p> <p><em>We are committed to working with and providing reasonable accommodations to applicants with physical and mental disabilities. If you need assistance and/or a reasonable accommodation in the application or recruiting process due to a disability, please contact us at accommodations@scale.com. Please see the United States Department of Labor's </em><a href="https://www.eeoc.gov/sites/default/files/2023-06/22-088_EEOC_KnowYourRights6.12ScreenRdr.pdf"><em>Know Your Rights poster</em></a><em> for additional information.</em></p> <p><em>We comply with the United States Department of Labor's </em><a href="https://www.dol.gov/sites/dolgov/files/ofccp/pdf/pay-transp_English_unformattedESQA508c.pdf"><em>Pay Transparency provision</em></a><em>.&nbsp;</em></p> <p><em><strong>PLEASE NOTE: </strong>We collect, retain and use personal data for our professional business purposes, including notifying you of job opportunities that may be of interest and sharing with our affiliates. raw_text: Job Title: Principal Architect. Description: <p class="p1"><strong>Principal Architect</strong></p> <p class="p2"><strong>Location:</strong> Washington, DC</p> <p class="p2"><strong>About the Role<br></strong>We are seeking a <strong>Principal Architect</strong> to drive the design, development, and deployment of our agentic AI products in a fast-paced, collaborative, extremely high-visibility environment.</p> <p class="p2">In this role, you will lead a team of 50+ engineers, providing both strategic and technical guidance. You’ll be responsible for high-impact architectural decisions, cross-company collaboration, and executive level engagements.<span class="Apple-converted-space">&nbsp;</span></p> <p class="p3"><span class="Apple-converted-space">&nbsp;</span></p> <p class="p2"><strong>What You’ll Do</strong></p> <ul class="ul1"> <li class="li4"><strong>Team Leadership:</strong> Lead and mentor a high-performing engineering team of 50+, fostering a culture of technical excellence and ownership.</li> <li class="li5"><strong>Technical Direction:</strong> Guide your team through complex challenges involving LLMs, AI agents, and large-scale distributed systems.</li> <li class="li5"><strong>Executive Stakeholder Engagement:</strong> Represent Scale AI in high-stakes negotiations and strategic discussions with senior external partners, demonstrating strong technical competence and credibility.</li> <li class="li4"><strong>Strategic Planning &amp; Communication:</strong> Develop and communicate a compelling vision for Scale AI’s technology applied to your program. Provide regular updates to senior leadership and key stakeholders on progress, risks, and opportunities.</li> <li class="li2"><strong>Culture &amp; Teamwork:</strong> Foster a culture of speed, unity of purpose, resilience, and teamwork. Lead through uncertainty with determination and adaptability.</li> </ul> <p class="p3"><span class="Apple-converted-space">&nbsp;</span></p> <p class="p2"><strong>What We’re Looking For</strong></p> <ul class="ul1"> <li class="li4">10+ years of software engineering experience, including 5+ years in a technical leadership or staff role.</li> <li class="li4">Deep understanding of modern AI/ML technologies, including experience working with LLMs and AI agents.</li> <li class="li4">Proficient in one or more modern programming languages (Python, JavaScript/TypeScript)</li> <li class="li4">Hands-on experience with Kubernetes and cloud infrastructure (AWS, GCP, or Azure).</li> <li class="li4">Strong product and business sense, with a track record of aligning engineering efforts with company goals.</li> <li class="li5">Ability to operate effectively in ambiguous, fast-changing environments and guide your team to do the same.</li> <li class="li2">Experience in executive level engagement with industry partners and Public Sector customers</li> </ul> <p class="p5"><strong>Success Metrics</strong></p> <p class="p2"><strong>Within 6 months:</strong></p> <ul class="ul1"> <li class="li2">Successful demonstration of agentic AI’s mission value in high-stakes customer demonstrations</li> <li class="li5">Establish Scale AI as the preferred agentic AI partner for the PEO</li> <li class="li5">Establish high velocity, agile engineering cadence both internally and with our industry partners</li> </ul> <p class="p2"><strong>Within 12–18 months:</strong></p> <ul class="ul1"> <li class="li5">Secure follow-on contract award with expanded scope for Scale</li> <li class="li5">Position Scale AI as the global AI leader in this mission area</li> <li class="li2">Establish developed solutions as Scale product offerings to deliver on future contracts</li> </ul><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p><em>Compensation packages at Scale for eligible roles include base salary, equity, and benefits. The range displayed on each job posting reflects the minimum and maximum target for new hire salaries for the position, determined by work location and additional factors, including job-related skills, experience, interview performance, and relevant education or training. Scale employees in eligible roles are also granted equity based compensation, subject to Board of Director approval. Your recruiter can share more about the specific salary range for your preferred location during the hiring process, and confirm whether the hired role will be eligible for equity grant. You’ll also receive benefits including, but not limited to: Comprehensive health, dental and vision coverage, retirement benefits, a learning and development stipend, and generous PTO. Additionally, this role may be eligible for additional benefits such as a commuter stipend.</em></p></div><div class="title">The base salary range for this full-time position in the location of Washington DC is:</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$257,000</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$321,000 USD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><p><strong><em>PLEASE NOTE:&nbsp;</em></strong><em>Our policy requires a 90-day waiting period before reconsidering candidates for the same role. This allows us to ensure a fair and thorough evaluation of all applicants.</em></p> <p><strong>About Us:</strong></p> <p><em>At Scale, our mission is to develop reliable AI systems for the world's most important decisions. raw_text: Job Title: Principal, Enterprise Product Marketing Manager. Description: <p>At Scale, we develop reliable AI systems for the world’s most important decisions. Scale’s product marketing team is responsible for developing and executing strategies that drive awareness and engagement for Scale’s offerings amongst our core audiences. We take a data-driven approach to understand our customers’ needs and challenges, ensuring that their voices are reflected in product development and messaging. We then partner closely with product, engineering, research, sales, comms,&nbsp; and the broader marketing team to create a cohesive customer experience across all our channels. We aim to provide valuable insights and resources that help our customers execute on their AI transformation journey.</p> <p>This role will focus on developing and optimizing vertical-specific messaging and content for Healthcare, Insurance, and Financial Services to ensure Scale resonates with core buyers in these sectors. The ideal candidate combines strategic thinking with hands-on execution.</p> <p><strong>You will:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Develop clear, compelling messaging for enterprise offerings tailored to key personas within Healthcare, Insurance, and Financial Services.</li> <li>Create marketing assets, including slide decks, videos, blog posts, and one-pagers, that effectively communicate our value propositions to vertical leaders.</li> <li>Drive marketing programs around each vertical to contribute to pipeline targets</li> <li>Lead positioning and sales enablement efforts to drive awareness and engagement for Scale’s offerings.</li> <li>Support the creation of case studies highlighting customer success within your assigned verticals.</li> <li>Partner with product, engineering, sales, and growth marketing to create a cohesive customer experience</li> <li>Collaborate with field marketing and events teams to develop vertical-specific event strategies, content, and experiences that drive engagement within customer and target accounts</li> <li>Manage the digital footprint for our Vertical Enterprise offerings across our website, marketplace listings, and analyst platforms</li> </ul> <p><strong>Ideally, you’d have:</strong></p> <ul> <li>7+ years of experience in product marketing in B2B enterprise environments, including at least one vertical sales-led growth motion</li> <li>An understanding of AI/ML technology and/or intuition for how to build content for executive buyers, IT, and business users.</li> <li>Excellent written and verbal communication, problem-solving, storytelling, and analysis skills</li> <li>Ability to influence at all levels, including executive, and to work across functions&nbsp;</li> <li>An outstanding level of attention to detail</li> </ul> <p><strong>Nice to haves:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Experience marketing AI products or services</li> </ul><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p><em>Compensation packages at Scale for eligible roles include base salary, equity, and benefits. The range displayed on each job posting reflects the minimum and maximum target for new hire salaries for the position, determined by work location and additional factors, including job-related skills, experience, interview performance, and relevant education or training. Scale employees in eligible roles are also granted equity based compensation, subject to Board of Director approval. Your recruiter can share more about the specific salary range for your preferred location during the hiring process, and confirm whether the hired role will be eligible for equity grant. You’ll also receive benefits including, but not limited to: Comprehensive health, dental and vision coverage, retirement benefits, a learning and development stipend, and generous PTO. Additionally, this role may be eligible for additional benefits such as a commuter stipend.</em></p></div><div class="title">Please reference the job posting's subtitle for where this position will be located. For pay transparency purposes, the base salary range for this full-time position in the locations of San Francisco, New York, Seattle is:</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$171,600</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$214,500 USD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><p><strong><em>PLEASE NOTE:&nbsp;</em></strong><em>Our policy requires a 90-day waiting period before reconsidering candidates for the same role. This allows us to ensure a fair and thorough evaluation of all applicants.</em></p> <p><strong>About Us:</strong></p> <p><em>At Scale, our mission is to develop reliable AI systems for the world's most important decisions. Our products provide the high-quality data and full-stack technologies that power the world's leading models, and help enterprises and governments build, deploy, and oversee AI applications that deliver real impact. We work closely with industry leaders like Meta, Cisco, DLA Piper, Mayo Clinic, Time Inc., the Government of Qatar, and U.S. government agencies including the Army and Air Force. We are expanding our team to accelerate the development of AI applications.</em></p> <p><em>We believe that everyone should be able to bring their whole selves to work, which is why we are proud to be an inclusive and equal opportunity workplace. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability status, gender identity or Veteran status.&nbsp;</em></p> <p><em>We are committed to working with and providing reasonable accommodations to applicants with physical and mental disabilities. If you need assistance and/or a reasonable accommodation in the application or recruiting process due to a disability, please contact us at accommodations@scale.com. Please see the United States Department of Labor's </em><a href="https://www.eeoc.gov/sites/default/files/2023-06/22-088_EEOC_KnowYourRights6.12ScreenRdr.pdf"><em>Know Your Rights poster</em></a><em> for additional information.</em></p> <p><em>We comply with the United States Department of Labor's </em><a href="https://www.dol.gov/sites/dolgov/files/ofccp/pdf/pay-transp_English_unformattedESQA508c.pdf"><em>Pay Transparency provision</em></a><em>.&nbsp;</em></p> <p><em><strong>PLEASE NOTE: </strong>We collect, retain and use personal data for our professional business purposes, including notifying you of job opportunities that may be of interest and sharing with our affiliates. Any information we collect in connection with your application will be treated in accordance with our internal policies and programs designed to protect personal data. Please see our <a href="https://scale.com/legal/privacy" target="_blank">privacy policy</a> for additional information.</em></p></div>

The range displayed on each job posting reflects the minimum and maximum target for new hire salaries for the position, determined by work location and additional factors, including job-related skills, experience, interview performance, and relevant education or training. Scale employees in eligible roles are also granted equity based compensation, subject to Board of Director approval. Your recruiter can share more about the specific salary range for your preferred location during the hiring process, and confirm whether the hired role will be eligible for equity grant. You’ll also receive benefits including, but not limited to: Comprehensive health, dental and vision coverage, retirement benefits, a learning and development stipend, and generous PTO. Additionally, this role may be eligible for additional benefits such as a commuter stipend.</em></p></div><div class="title">Please reference the job posting's subtitle for where this position will be located. For pay transparency purposes, the base salary range for this full-time position in the locations of San Francisco, New York, Seattle is:</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$171,600</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$214,500 USD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><p><strong><em>PLEASE NOTE:&nbsp;</em></strong><em>Our policy requires a 90-day waiting period before reconsidering candidates for the same role. This allows us to ensure a fair and thorough evaluation of all applicants.</em></p> <p><strong>About Us:</strong></p> <p><em>At Scale, our mission is to develop reliable AI systems for the world's most important decisions. Our products provide the high-quality data and full-stack technologies that power the world's leading models, and help enterprises and governments build, deploy, and oversee AI applications that deliver real impact. We work closely with industry leaders like Meta, Cisco, DLA Piper, Mayo Clinic, Time Inc., the Government of Qatar, and U.S. government agencies including the Army and Air Force. We are expanding our team to accelerate the development of AI applications.</em></p> <p><em>We believe that everyone should be able to bring their whole selves to work, which is why we are proud to be an inclusive and equal opportunity workplace. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability status, gender identity or Veteran status.&nbsp;</em></p> <p><em>We are committed to working with and providing reasonable accommodations to applicants with physical and mental disabilities. raw_text: Job Title: Product Designer, Enterprise. Description: <p><strong>About Scale</strong></p> <p>At Scale AI, our mission is to accelerate the development of AI applications. For 8 years, Scale has been the leading AI data foundry, helping fuel the most exciting advancements in AI, including: generative AI, defense applications, and autonomous vehicles. With our recent Series F round, we’re accelerating the abundance of frontier data to pave the road to Artificial General Intelligence (AGI), and building upon our prior model evaluation work with enterprise customers and governments, to deepen our capabilities and offerings for both public and private evaluations.</p> <p><strong>About the Enterprise AI Team</strong></p> <p>ACScale GP (Scale Generative AI Platform) is an enterprise-grade AI platform providing APIs for knowledge retrieval, inference, evaluation, and more. We are looking for a highly pragmatic and ownership-driven Product Designer to help build AI-powered applications that redefine enterprise workflows and push the boundaries of interactive AI. This role is ideal for someone who thrives in a fast-paced environment, has a strong sense of “ambition shapes reality,” and has experience building complex, technical products—preferably from zero to one in startup or scale-up contexts.</p> <p>At Scale, you'll work on a mix of cutting-edge customer-facing AI applications and internal SaaS products. Our design team has contributed to innovative projects like TIME’s Person of the Year AI experience, where our AI technology shaped one of the most iconic features in media. You’ll also contribute to Scale’s GenAI Platform (SGP), a powerful system that enables businesses to build and deploy AI agents at scale. Whether it’s creating forward-deployed, enterprise-grade solutions for Fortune 500 companies or refining our core product platform for generative AI development, you’ll play a crucial role in shaping how AI integrates into real-world applications.</p> <p><strong>You Will:</strong></p> <ul> <li><strong>Design and refine</strong> user experiences for AI-powered applications used by major enterprise customers, including high-profile media and Fortune 500 companies.</li> <li><strong>Lead end-to-end design efforts</strong> for Scale’s GenAI Platform, ensuring that complex AI workflows are approachable and intuitive.</li> <li><strong>Collaborate cross-functionally</strong> with product managers, engineers (ML, backend, and frontend), and other stakeholders to define requirements and translate them into compelling user flows, wireframes, and polished UI designs.</li> <li><strong>Conduct user research</strong> and gather feedback to validate design assumptions, iterate rapidly, and deliver data-informed solutions for both technical and non-technical audiences.</li> <li><strong>Prototype new ideas</strong> quickly, testing and validating hypotheses around AI-driven user experiences.</li> <li><strong>Own the entire design process</strong> for projects—from concept to final implementation—maintaining a high bar for quality, usability, and visual polish.</li> <li><strong>Contribute to our design system</strong>, ensuring consistent design language across all products, while evolving it to meet the needs of complex AI and enterprise use cases.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Ideally, You'd Have:</strong></p> <ul> <li><strong>4+ years</strong> of experience designing products in fast-paced, tech-forward environments, ideally with some zero-to-one startup or scale-up experience.</li> <li>A <strong>portfolio</strong> showcasing ownership of end-to-end product design, especially in building complex, technical, or AI-powered products.</li> <li>Experience <strong>designing for highly technical audiences</strong>, such as developers, data scientists, or ML engineers, and a strong interest in AI.</li> <li>A <strong>pragmatic approach</strong> to design, balancing user empathy, technical constraints, Aand business objectives to ship impactful products quickly.</li> <li>Familiarity with <strong>design tools</strong> (Figma, Sketch, etc.) and an ability to create prototypes at varying levels of fidelity.</li> <li><strong>Excellent communication skills</strong>, with the ability to present complex design concepts to stakeholders at all levels.</li> <li>A strong sense of <strong>“ambition shapes reality”</strong>—you thrive in environments where ownership, autonomy, and scrappiness are valued.</li> </ul><div class="content-conclusion"><p><strong><em>PLEASE NOTE:&nbsp;</em></strong><em>Our policy requires a 90-day waiting period before reconsidering candidates for the same role. This allows us to ensure a fair and thorough evaluation of all applicants.</em></p> <p><strong>About Us:</strong></p> <p><em>At Scale, our mission is to develop reliable AI systems for the world's most important decisions. Our products provide the high-quality data and full-stack technologies that power the world's leading models, and help enterprises and governments build, deploy, and oversee AI applications that deliver real impact. We work closely with industry leaders like Meta, Cisco, DLA Piper, Mayo Clinic, Time Inc., the Government of Qatar, and U.S. government agencies including the Army and Air Force. We are expanding our team to accelerate the development of AI applications.</em></p> <p><em>We believe that everyone should be able to bring their whole selves to work, which is why we are proud to be an inclusive and equal opportunity workplace. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability status, gender identity or Veteran status.&nbsp;</em></p> <p><em>We are committed to working with and providing reasonable accommodations to applicants with physical and mental disabilities. If you need assistance and/or a reasonable accommodation in the application or recruiting process due to a disability, please contact us at accommodations@scale.com. Please see the United States Department of Labor's </em><a href="https://www.eeoc.gov/sites/default/files/2023-06/22-088_EEOC_KnowYourRights6.12ScreenRdr.pdf"><em>Know Your Rights poster</em></a><em> for additional information.</em></p> <p><em>We comply with the United States Department of Labor's </em><a href="https://www.dol.gov/sites/dolgov/files/ofccp/pdf/pay-transp_English_unformattedESQA508c.pdf"><em>Pay Transparency provision</em></a><em>.&nbsp;</em></p> <p><em><strong>PLEASE NOTE: </strong>We collect, retain and use personal data for our professional business purposes, including notifying you of job opportunities that may be of interest and sharing with our affiliates. We limit the personal data we collect to that which we believe is appropriate and necessary to manage applicants’ needs, provide our services, and comply with applicable laws. Any information we collect in connection with your application will be treated in accordance with our internal policies and programs designed to protect personal data. Please see our <a href="https://scale.com/legal/privacy" target="_blank">privacy policy</a> for additional information.</em></p></div>

raw_text: Job Title: Product Designer, GenAI. Description: <h3>About Scale</h3> <p>At Scale AI, our mission is to accelerate the development of AI applications. For 8 years, Scale has been the leading AI data foundry, helping fuel the most exciting advancements in AI, including: generative AI, defense applications, and autonomous vehicles. With our recent Series F round, we’re accelerating the abundance of frontier data to pave the road to Artificial General Intelligence (AGI), and building upon our prior model evaluation work with enterprise customers and governments, to deepen our capabilities and offerings for both public and private evaluations.</p> <h3>About the Gen AI Team</h3> <p>Our Gen AI team is responsible for developing a first-class experience that leads to a low friction, high polish, and high trust experience for vetted high-quality GenAI contributors. The team owns and develops critical contributor workflows that provide our contributors with transparency, cohesiveness &amp; choice. We’re building the world’s top expert platform, with the goal of attracting the best experts across all relevant fields, and making it fun and interesting for them to train the next generation of LLMs.</p> <h3>You Will</h3> <ul> <li>Lead the end-to-end design process to elevate the contributor experience, partnering closely with cross-functional teams to define requirements and translate them into intuitive user flows, wireframes, and polished UI designs.</li> <li>System design experience working in a 0 --&gt; 1 capacity&nbsp;</li> <li>Design, refine, and ship high quality solutions by rapidly prototyping and validating&nbsp;<br>AI driven experiences, testing hypotheses, and iterating based on user and business feedback.</li> <li>Own design from concept through execution, maintaining a consistently high bar for quality, usability, accessibility, and visual craft.</li> <li>Develop a strong point of view on the desired user experience by deeply understanding user needs, business goals, and technical constraints.</li> <li>Articulate and defend design decisions using data, user insights, and sound design rationale.</li> <li>Make thoughtful tradeoffs between short-term velocity and long-term product vision, guided by business priorities and user impact.</li> <li>Contribute to, adopt, and evolve the design system to ensure consistency, scalability, and high-quality standards across products.</li> </ul> <h3>Ideally, You’d Have</h3> <ul> <li>5+ years of relevant product design experience.</li> <li>A proven track record of shipping consumer facing products with thoughtfully crafted design and strong attention to detail.</li> <li>Strong interaction design, visual design, and content design (UX writing) skills.</li> <li>High proficiency in Figma and other design tools, with the ability to select the right medium to effectively communicate your thinking.</li> <li>Comfortable operating in a fast-paced, ambiguous environment.</li> <li>A desire to influence and shape the design process, standards, and culture across the organization.</li> </ul> <h3>Nice to Have</h3> <ul> <li>Familiarity with AI and LLM-driven product experiences.</li> <li>Experience contributing to or scaling design systems.</li> <li>Experience conducting and synthesizing user interviews and translating insights into actionable design decisions.</li> </ul><div raw_text: Job Title: Product Designer, International Public Sector. Description: <p>Scale’s rapidly growing International Public Sector team is focused on using AI to address critical challenges facing the public sector around the world. Our core work consists of:</p> <ul> <li>Creating custom AI applications that will impact millions of citizens</li> <li>Generating high-quality training data for national LLMs</li> <li>Upskilling and advisory services to spread the impact of AI</li> </ul> <p>As a Product Designer, you’ll design scalable AI applications that can serve public sector clients across the world and design tools that will enable our operators to efficiently create high-quality data for AI models. Your work will directly influence adoption and success of AI in real-world scenarios, making user-centric design a cornerstone of Scale’s business strategy.</p> <p>At Scale, we’re not just building AI solutions—we’re enabling the public sector to transform their operations and better serve citizens through cutting-edge technology. If you’re ready to shape the future of AI across the globe and be a founding member of our team, we’d love to hear from you.</p> <h2><strong>You Will:</strong></h2> <ul> <li><strong>Design and raw_text: Job Title: Product Manager. Description: <p>Scale is at the forefront of the AI revolution, working with some of the largest companies in the world to unlock the potential of Generative AI for their business.</p> <p>We develop bespoke solutions that leverage our customer’s proprietary data and expertise to transform their businesses with AI. We work with them to understand the biggest levers for their business and then forward deploy with their teams to build cutting edge solutions. The applications we build are powered by the Scale GenAI Platform, a full stack product to build, test and deploy cutting edge agents.&nbsp;</p> <p>Some examples of GenAI applications we build are:</p> <ul> <li>Content-generation systems that enable sales teams to be more effective and efficient.</li> <li>Highly customized wealth management copilots that make advisors more effective by helping them tap into their knowledge bases quickly and accurately.</li> <li>Text2SQL business intelligence applications to make analysts more efficient and embed a culture of data-driven decision-making.</li> </ul> <p>We are seeking an experienced product manager to join our team and play a pivotal role in building AI solutions with and for our customers. The ideal candidate will have a strong understanding of software engineering principles and practices and deep experience with ML/AI application development. You will be responsible for owning large AI projects for one or many customers.&nbsp;</p> <p>You will:</p> <ul> <li>Develop enterprise grade solutions that leverage cutting edge AI to drive business value at world class companies across many industries.&nbsp;</li> <li>Work with executives at Scale and our customers to determine and execute the product strategy of the business.</li> <li>Own end-to-end product development by understanding customer pain points, defining product requirements, managing development, testing, and launches.</li> <li>Lead cross-functional teams including engineering, product design, operations, marketing, go-to-market and finance.</li> <li>Develop a point of view and execute on turning the solutions we build into repeatable software that we can commercialize across the industry.&nbsp;</li> </ul> <p>Ideally you’d have:</p> <ul> <li>Technical degree in computer science, engineering, or equivalent experience</li> <li>4+ years of experience in building ML-powered products, experience in enterprise-facing products is a plus</li> <li>Strong understanding of generative AI technologies and their applications in enterprise settings</li> <li>Experience operating in a fast-paced environment with high ambiguity</li> <li>Exceptional leadership, presentation and communication skills with the ability to influence cross-functional teams</li> <li>Some coding experience (Python)</li> </ul><div class="content-conclusion"><p><strong><em>PLEASE NOTE:&nbsp;</em></strong><em>Our policy requires a 90-day waiting period before reconsidering candidates for the same role. This allows us to ensure a fair and thorough evaluation of all applicants.</em></p> <p><strong>About Us:</strong></p> <p><em>At Scale, our mission is to develop reliable AI systems for the world's most important decisions. Our products provide the high-quality data and full-stack technologies that power the world's leading models, and help enterprises and governments build, deploy, and oversee AI applications that deliver real impact. We work closely with industry leaders like Meta, Cisco, DLA Piper, Mayo Clinic, Time Inc., the Government of Qatar, and U.S. government agencies including the Army and Air Force. We are expanding our team to accelerate the development of AI applications.</em></p> <p><em>We believe that everyone should be able to bring their whole selves to work, which is why we are proud to be an inclusive and equal opportunity workplace. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability status, gender identity or Veteran status.&nbsp;</em></p> <p><em>We are committed to working with and providing reasonable accommodations to applicants with physical and mental disabilities. If you need assistance and/or a reasonable accommodation in the application or recruiting process due to a disability, please contact us at accommodations@scale.com. Please see the United States Department of Labor's </em><a href="https://www.eeoc.gov/sites/default/files/2023-06/22-088_EEOC_KnowYourRights6.12ScreenRdr.pdf"><em>Know Your Rights poster</em></a><em> for additional information.</em></p> <p><em>We comply with the United States Department of Labor's </em><a href="https://www.dol.gov/sites/dolgov/files/ofccp/pdf/pay-transp_English_unformattedESQA508c.pdf"><em>Pay Transparency provision</em></a><em>.&nbsp;</em></p> <p><em><strong>PLEASE NOTE: </strong>We collect, retain and use personal data for our professional business purposes, including notifying you of job opportunities that may be of interest and sharing with our affiliates. We limit the personal data we collect to that which we believe is appropriate and necessary to manage applicants’ needs, provide our services, and comply with applicable laws. Any information we collect in connection with your application will be treated in accordance with our internal policies and programs designed to protect personal data. Please see our <a href="https://scale.com/legal/privacy" target="_blank">privacy policy</a> for additional information.</em></p></div>

raw_text: Job Title: Product Manager, Contributor (CB) Pay & Incentives. Description: <p><strong>About the Role:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Scale operates a global marketplace for talent, working with Contributors in over 100 countries.&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</li> <li>Understand the cost efficiency and quality for different payment structures - pay by hour, pay by task, etc. to ensure pay transparency, fairness and predictability</li> <li>This is a highly cross functional role that will involve working with:</li> <ul> <li>Dedicated Eng, design and data science staffing + PMs across the org</li> <li>Growth, Payment operations and delivery operations for each new project launched</li> <li>Support for issues that come up</li> </ul> </ul> <p><strong>You will:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Understand our business, customer experience and ecosystem position</li> <li>Set the product strategy for the Pay team</li> <li>Develop and execute a data-driven, contributor-focused product roadmap through close collaboration with senior leadership, Operations, Data Science, Analytics, Design, and Engineering while balancing business needs.&nbsp;</li> <li>Translate customer and internal-user needs into clear, well-defined functional and technical requirements backed by data analysis and deep understanding of our users</li> <li>Guide and interface closely with data analysts and engineering teams to define scope, review and refine technical capabilities, prioritize projects for release, and define new opportunities.</li> <li>Build long-term instrumentation, monitoring, and evaluation capabilities for product performance, tracking, and to create product insights.&nbsp;</li> <li>Establish business cases and projected return on investment to identify and prioritize opportunities</li> <li>Partner with Finance and Business Leaders to manage the impact on the profitability of the overall business.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Ideally, you’d have:</strong></p> <ul> <li>5-8 years of experience in Product Management in the tech industry</li> <li>Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills, capable of influencing across technical and non-technical audiences to drive strategic outcomes.</li> <li>Strong business acumen and analytical experience, with demonstrated success in defining emerging or ambiguous user behaviors and driving continuous iteration in high-uncertainty environments.</li> <li>Nice-to-have:</li> <ul> <li>Strong understanding of the AI market and willingness to stay at the cutting edge. Deep understanding of modelling workflows, including data labeling, model training, inference, and deployment, with the ability to translate technical concepts into actionable product strategies.</li> <li>Experience building products from the ground up, seeing them through the scaling journey</li> <li>Experienced in building scalable decision systems, partnering cross-functionally with policy,&nbsp;</li> </ul> <li>Bachelor’s or advanced degree in a quantitative, engineering, or related discipline, with strong comfort in engaging deeply with technical and data-driven problem spaces.</li> </ul> <p><br><br></p><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p><em>Compensation packages at Scale for eligible roles include base salary, equity, and benefits. The range displayed on each job posting reflects the minimum and maximum target for new hire salaries for the position, determined by work location and additional factors, including job-related skills, experience, interview performance, and relevant education or training. Scale employees in eligible roles are also granted equity based compensation, subject to Board of Director approval. Your recruiter can share more about the specific salary range for your preferred location during the hiring process, and confirm whether the hired role will be eligible for equity grant. You’ll also receive benefits including, but not limited to: Comprehensive health, dental and vision coverage, retirement benefits, a learning and development stipend, and generous PTO. Additionally, this role may be eligible for additional benefits such as a commuter stipend.</em></p></div><div class="title">Please reference the job posting's subtitle for where this position will be located. For pay transparency purposes, the base salary range for this full-time position in the locations of San Francisco, New York, Seattle is:</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$164,800</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$197,760 USD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><p><strong><em>PLEASE NOTE:&nbsp;</em></strong><em>Our policy requires a 90-day waiting period before reconsidering candidates for the same role. This allows us to ensure a fair and thorough evaluation of all applicants.</em></p> <p><strong>About Us:</strong></p> <p><em>At Scale, our mission is to develop reliable AI systems for the world's most important decisions. Our products provide the high-quality data and full-stack technologies that power the world's leading models, and help enterprises and governments build, deploy, and oversee AI applications that deliver real impact. raw_text: Job Title: Product Manager, Contributor Quality and Enablement. Description: <p>Scale AI is a 2-sided marketplace. On the demand side we have customers that need labeled data to train their AI models or AI applications. On the supply side we have millions of contributors distributed worldwide.</p> <p>The biggest business problem we currently face is: identifying the right contributors from across the globe to complete tasks on a specific project. Identifying the right users enables us to deliver higher quality data to our customers sooner, with less waste.</p> <p>You will build products and systems to:</p> <ul> <li>Identify the right contributors to staff on each project</li> <li>Identify the right contributors to review tasks completed by other users</li> <li>Train contributors to understand what a good vs. bad task deliverable looks like</li> </ul> <p><strong>About the Role:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Scale operates a global marketplace for talent, working with Contributors in over 100 countries. &nbsp; <br><br></li> <li>Today, each project we have with a customer operates in a very bespoke style. We need to standardize data across all projects and centrally predict which contributors will succeed sooner.</li> <ul> <li>This will affect the experience all new and existing contributors will have&nbsp;</li> </ul> </ul> <ul> <li>This is a highly cross functional role that will involve working with:</li> <ul> <li>Dedicated Eng, design and data science staffing + PMs across the org</li> <li>ML researchers to build models to predict which CBs will succeed</li> <li>Operators who run our projects and have hands on experience on what’s worked for them</li> <li>Other enablement functions as we create course content</li> </ul> </ul> <p><strong>You will:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Understand our business, customer experience and ecosystem position</li> <li>Set the product strategy for the contributor quality &amp; enablement team including running several experiments in parallel</li> <li>Develop and execute a data-driven, contributor-focused product roadmap through close collaboration with senior leadership, Operations, Data Science, Analytics, Design, and Engineering while balancing business needs.&nbsp;</li> <li>Translate customer and internal-user needs into clear, well-defined functional and technical requirements backed by data analysis and deep understanding of our users</li> <li>Guide and interface closely with data analysis and engineering teams to define scope, review and refine technical capabilities, prioritize projects for release, and define new opportunities.</li> <li>Build long-term instrumentation, monitoring, and evaluation capabilities for product performance, tracking, and to create product insights.&nbsp;</li> <li>Establish business cases and projected return on investment to identify and prioritize opportunities</li> <li>Partner with Finance and Business Leaders to manage the impact on the profitability of the overall business.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Ideally, you’d have:</strong></p> <ul> <li>5-8 years of experience in Product Management in the tech industry</li> <li>Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills, capable of influencing across technical and non-technical audiences to drive strategic outcomes.</li> <li>Treat contributors as valued customers especially as the % experts increases and datasets get more specialized and complex</li> <ul> <li>Strong business acumen and analytical experience, with demonstrated success in defining emerging or ambiguous user behaviors and driving continuous iteration in high-uncertainty environments.</li> </ul> <li>Nice-to-have:</li> <ul> <li>Experienced in building scalable decision systems, partnering cross-functionally with policy, data science, and operations to enhance user protection and model reliability</li> <li>Experience working on EdTech or roles that require working closely with Ops (generally with several internal tools)</li> <li>Strong understanding of the AI market and willingness to stay at the cutting edge. Deep understanding of modelling workflows, including data labeling, model training, inference, and deployment, with the ability to translate technical concepts into actionable product strategies.</li> <li>Experience building products from the ground up, seeing them through the scaling journey of a business, and dogfooding to understand the users’ perspective</li> </ul> <li>Bachelor’s or advanced degree in a quantitative, engineering, or related discipline, with strong comfort in engaging deeply with technical and data-driven problem spaces.</li> </ul><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p><em>Compensation packages at Scale for eligible roles include base salary, equity, and benefits. The range displayed on each job posting reflects the minimum and maximum target for new hire salaries for the position, determined by work location and additional factors, including job-related skills, experience, interview performance, and relevant education or training. Scale employees in eligible roles are also granted equity based compensation, subject to Board of Director approval. Your recruiter can share more about the specific salary range for your preferred location during the hiring process, and confirm whether the hired role will be eligible for equity grant. You’ll also receive benefits including, but not limited to: Comprehensive health, dental and vision coverage, retirement benefits, a learning and development stipend, and generous PTO. Additionally, this role may be eligible for additional benefits such as a commuter stipend.</em></p></div><div class="title">Please reference the job posting's subtitle for where this position will be located. For pay transparency purposes, the base salary range for this full-time position in the locations of San Francisco, New York, Seattle is:</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$206,800</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$258,500 USD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><p><strong><em>PLEASE NOTE:&nbsp;</em></strong><em>Our policy requires a 90-day waiting period before reconsidering candidates for the same role. This allows us to ensure a fair and thorough evaluation of all applicants.</em></p> <p><strong>About Us:</strong></p> <p><em>At Scale, our mission is to develop reliable AI systems for the world's most important decisions. Our products provide the high-quality data and full-stack technologies that power the world's leading models, and help enterprises and governments build, deploy, and oversee AI applications that deliver real impact. We work closely with industry leaders like Meta, Cisco, DLA Piper, Mayo Clinic, Time Inc., the Government of Qatar, and U.S. government agencies including the Army and Air Force. We are expanding our team to accelerate the development of AI applications.</em></p> <p><em>We believe that everyone should be able to bring their whole selves to work, which is why we are proud to be an inclusive and equal opportunity workplace. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability status, gender identity or Veteran status.&nbsp;</em></p> <p><em>We are committed to working with and providing reasonable accommodations to applicants with physical and mental disabilities. raw_text: Job Title: Product Manager of AI Applications, International Public Sector. Description: <p>Scale is growing rapidly, and joining the International Public Sector team is an opportunity to work on one of the most exciting and quickly expanding teams at Scale. This team is responsible for generating, executing, and fostering Scale’s work with governments and government-backed entities outside of the United States.&nbsp;</p> <p>We develop bespoke solutions that leverage our customers’ proprietary data and expertise to transform their organizations with AI. We work with them to understand their pain points and workflows and then forward deploy our team to build cutting-edge solutions. The applications we build are powered by the Scale GenAI Platform, a full stack product to build, test and deploy frontier AI agents.</p> <ul> <li>Developing custom AI applications</li> <li>Building custom LLMs</li> <li>Providing high-quality training data for research and government institutions building LLMs</li> <li>Developing partnerships to foster regional talent growth and AI adoption</li> </ul> <p>We are looking for an entrepreneurial and experienced product leader to play a pivotal role in the ideation and development of transformative AI solutions. raw_text: Job Title: Program Manager (Homeland Layered Defense), Public Sector. Description: <p>Scale's public sector business is providing the best of American commercial technology and innovation to protect the homeland and meet the moment. Our ultimate goal is to deliver cutting-edge agentic AI to orchestrate portfolio management for defense of the homeland.</p> <p>We’re hiring a Program Manager (PgM) to lead and own execution for Scale’s portfolio of clients charged with a layered defense for the United States. You will be a catalyst, a hands-on leader, manage customer relationships and partners, and work closely with our engineering team to solve Scale’s hardest problems. You must be willing to go deep, get technical, and drive change.&nbsp; This role is ideal for someone who blends program leadership, systems-building obsession, technical fluency — and who thrives in fast-moving, ambiguous, and mission-driven environments.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>You will:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Serve as the contractual and internal program lead across a large-scale public sector engagement, integrating multiple sub-efforts under one umbrella (e.g., data pipelines for computer vision, software deployments for GenAI solutions)</li> <li>Own relationships with senior government stakeholders and ensure that we meet contractual obligations, performance metrics, and reporting requirements</li> <li>Own relationships with subcontractors to ensure successful delivery of the prime contract</li> <li>Lead formal engagements such as contract reviews, customer program syncs, performance assessments, and reporting cycles</li> <li>Lead and supervise a team of 3-4 delivery managers who run day-to-day customer engagement efforts</li> <li>Oversee a technical delivery team that will drive product roadmap alignment that adapts evolving customer needs</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>Must haves:</strong></p> <ul> <li>An active TS/SCI clearance</li> <li>10+ years professional experience, ideally managing complex technical programs for DoD or national security customers</li> <li>A proven ability to lead large, cross-functional efforts across delivery, contracts, and customer teams</li> <li>A healthy obsession with establishing and driving adoption of programmatic systems and processes; plus the ability to exert influence and manage associated change</li> <li>Familiarity with FAR-based contracts and program structures like IDIQs, task orders, and OTAs</li> <li>Strong business acumen with the ability to manage performance metrics, contract deliverables, and program budgets</li> <li>A track record of high ownership in ambiguous environments</li> <li>Excellent written and verbal communication skills — especially with senior government stakeholders</li> <li>Deep curiosity about agentic AI and its application to homeland layered defense</li> <li>A willingness to travel up to 25% of the time</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>We have a diverse team with a variety of skill sets, many have:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Proficiency in Python, SQL or other programming languages</li> <li>A proven track record in B2B + B2G client facing roles and expanding client relationships</li> <li>Prior experience delivering technical solutions to government customers</li> <li>Domain expertise in a relevant field (e.g. modeling and simulation, joint planning processes, intelligence workflows, etc)</li> </ul><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p><em>Compensation packages at Scale for eligible roles include base salary, equity, and benefits. The range displayed on each job posting reflects the minimum and maximum target for new hire salaries for the position, determined by work location and additional factors, including job-related skills, experience, interview performance, and relevant education or training. Scale employees in eligible roles are also granted equity based compensation, subject to Board of Director approval. Your recruiter can share more about the specific salary range for your preferred location during the hiring process, and confirm whether the hired role will be eligible for equity grant. You’ll also receive benefits including, but not limited to: Comprehensive health, dental and vision coverage, retirement benefits, a learning and development stipend, and generous PTO. Additionally, this role may be eligible for additional benefits such as a commuter stipend.</em></p></div><div class="title">The base salary range for this full-time position in the location of Washington DC is:</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$223,300</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$279,400 USD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><p><strong><em>PLEASE NOTE:&nbsp;</em></strong><em>Our policy requires a 90-day waiting period before reconsidering candidates for the same role. This allows us to ensure a fair and thorough evaluation of all applicants.</em></p> <p><strong>About Us:</strong></p> <p><em>At Scale, our mission is to develop reliable AI systems for the world's most important decisions. Our products provide the high-quality data and full-stack technologies that power the world's leading models, and help enterprises and governments build, deploy, and oversee AI applications that deliver real impact. We work closely with industry leaders like Meta, Cisco, DLA Piper, Mayo Clinic, Time Inc., the Government of Qatar, and U.S. government agencies including the Army and Air Force. We are expanding our team to accelerate the development of AI applications.</em></p> <p><em>We believe that everyone should be able to bring their whole selves to work, which is why we are proud to be an inclusive and equal opportunity workplace. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability status, gender identity or Veteran status.&nbsp;</em></p> <p><em>We are committed to working with and providing reasonable accommodations to applicants with physical and mental disabilities. If you need assistance and/or a reasonable accommodation in the application or recruiting process due to a disability, please contact us at accommodations@scale.com. Please see the United States Department of Labor's </em><a href="https://www.eeoc.gov/sites/default/files/2023-06/22-088_EEOC_KnowYourRights6.12ScreenRdr.pdf"><em>Know Your Rights poster</em></a><em> for additional information.</em></p> <p><em>We comply with the United States Department of Labor's </em><a href="https://www.dol.gov/sites/dolgov/files/ofccp/pdf/pay-transp_English_unformattedESQA508c.pdf"><em>Pay Transparency provision</em></a><em>.&nbsp;</em></p> <p><em><strong>PLEASE NOTE: </strong>We collect, retain and use personal data for our professional business purposes, including notifying you of job opportunities that may be of interest and sharing with our affiliates. We limit the personal data we collect to that which we believe is appropriate and necessary to manage applicants’ needs, provide our services, and comply with applicable laws. Any information we collect in connection with your application will be treated in accordance with our internal policies and programs designed to protect personal data. Please see our <a href="https://scale.com/legal/privacy" target="_blank">privacy policy</a> for additional information.</em></p></div>
